title: Sr Graphic Designer
description:
LOCATION: Remote (PH preferred)

SCHEDULE: Project-based to start, with work primarily during PH hours; occasional calls with founder in Europe

COMPENSATION: $8-14 USD/hour depending on experience and skillset

START DATE: ASAP



#ABOUT THE ROLE



Leaven Marketing is hiring a Graphic Designer to create high-converting visual assets for Amazon client accounts. You’ll work closely with the Listing Manager to turn creative briefs into polished, brand-aligned designs across listing images, A+ Content, Brand Stores, testing assets, and advertising creatives. This is a project-based role for a designer with strong visual instincts, fluent English, and a clear understanding of how design drives clicks, conversion, and brand trust in ecommerce. Over time, this role could grow into a broader Creative Manager position.



#CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



AMAZON CREATIVE EXECUTION

-Design high-quality visual assets for Amazon listings, including image stacks, A+ Content, Brand Story modules, and Brand Stores

-Translate creative briefs into brand-aligned, conversion-focused designs that clearly communicate product value

-Create assets for listing tests, including alternate main images, infographic variations, and other CRO-focused design concepts

-Prepare creative files according to Amazon specifications and platform requirements



ADVERTISING & CAMPAIGN ASSETS

-Design visual assets for Amazon advertising initiatives, including Sponsored Brands creative, Store creatives, and other campaign-related placements

-Support the team with creative variations for testing click-through rate and conversion improvements

-Collaborate with the Listing Manager and PPC team to ensure ad creatives align with product positioning and campaign goals



BRAND INTERPRETATION & VISUAL STORYTELLING

-Absorb each client’s brand identity, customer profile, and market positioning, then translate that into effective visual communication

-Maintain brand consistency across all client assets while adapting designs to fit Amazon best practices and shopper behavior

-Create designs that balance clarity, persuasion, and aesthetics in a highly competitive ecommerce environment



COLLABORATION & WORKFLOW

-Work closely with the Listing Manager, who owns the strategy and creative briefing process

-Communicate clearly on timelines, revisions, and scope as projects move through production

-Participate in occasional internal discussions or calls with the founder and team as needed

-Collaborate effectively in an async-first environment with the core team based in the Philippines



AGENCY CREATIVE SUPPORT

-Occasionally support design needs for Leaven Marketing’s own brand, marketing materials, or internal initiatives

-Contribute to raising the overall visual standard of the agency’s client deliverables



REQUIREMENTS

-5+ years of graphic design experience

-Fluent English, both written and spoken

-Strong portfolio demonstrating brand identity work, ecommerce design, and conversion-focused creative

-Strong command of professional design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite

-Ability to create original, polished work without relying heavily on templates

-Excellent visual judgment, layout skills, typography, and hierarchy

-Ability to understand and apply a client’s brand identity across multiple asset types

-Strong understanding of the role design plays in ecommerce performance, including conversion, click-through rate, and shopper engagement

-Able to take strategic direction and turn it into clean, effective execution

-Organized, responsive, and capable of managing project-based work independently

-Experience designing for Amazon is a bonus, but not required

-Experience working with remote teams and async communication is a plus



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE

-Client creative assets are delivered at a high standard and aligned with the strategy outlined in each brief

-Design work consistently reflects strong taste, brand consistency, and ecommerce best practices

-Assets are not only visually strong, but built to drive clicks, conversion, and customer clarity

-The Listing Manager is supported by a reliable designer who can bring briefs to life without excessive hand-holding

-Clients receive polished, professional creative work that strengthens their Amazon presence

-The role grows from project-based support into a trusted creative function within the agency



IMMEDIATE PROJECTS IN PIPELINE

-A+ Content overhaul

-Main image testing assets

-Brand Store buildout

-Additional Amazon creative projects for active clients

title: Credentialing Specialist - Provider Enrollment
description:
Position Summary



Noor Locums is seeking an experienced Credentialing Specialist with a strong background

in hospital privileging and provider enrollment. This role supports our locum tenens

physician division by managing credentialing files from document collection through

hospital approval and payer enrollment.

The ideal candidate has experience working with hospital medical staff offices, locum

tenens agencies, healthcare staffing firms, or third-party credentialing organizations.



Key Responsibilities

> Prepare and submit hospital privilege applications for physicians and advanced practice

providers

> Collect and verify credentialing documents including licenses, DEA, board certifications,

malpractice history, and references

> Coordinate credentialing activities with hospital medical staff offices, providers, and

recruiters

> Track application status and ensure timely completion of all credentialing requirements

> Assist with Medicare and Medicaid provider enrollment

> Maintain credentialing checklists and ensure files are compliant and complete



Required Qualifications

> 2+ years of healthcare credentialing experience

> Direct experience processing hospital privileging applications

> Experience working with hospital medical staff offices or healthcare staffing agencies

> Knowledge of credentialing documentation and compliance requirements

> Strong organizational and communication skills



Preferred Experience

> Locum tenens credentialing experience

> Medical Staff Coordinator or hospital credentialing background

> Medicare / Medicaid provider enrollment experience

> Experience working in fast-paced healthcare staffing environments



About Noor Locums

Noor Locums is a physician-centric locum tenens staffing firm providing physicians and

advanced practice providers to healthcare organizations nationwide. Our team focuses on

delivering high-quality providers while ensuring smooth credentialing and on-time start

dates for our clients.

title: AI Agent Developer & Operations Specialist
description:
The Role



You will be the technical owner of our AI agent ecosystem. We currently run 30+ automated skills and agents through Claude (Anthropic), OpenClaw, and various API integrations (HubSpot, 
, Google Workspace, RingCentral). Your job is to deploy, maintain, improve, and scale these agents — and build new ones as the business needs them.



This is NOT a traditional software engineering role. You will be working with AI agent frameworks, prompt engineering, API integrations, automated
 systems, CRM pipeline automation, and server deployment. You are essentially building AI employees that do the work of real staff members — generating reports, moving deals through pipelines, sending follow-up
s, updating dashboards, and surfacing insights to managers automatically.



You need to be comfortable figuring things out fast in a rapidly evolving AI tooling landscape.



what we need done.



Pipeline & Lead Hygiene (Sales / BCO)



Auto-flag inactive leads with no activity after 7 days and alert the manager

Auto-flag leads with fewer than 3 contact attempts within 14 days

Enforce the 400-lead cap and remove overflow automatically

Check if a lead is already a client or on the DNC list before it ever gets dialed

Distribute new leads evenly across setters via round-robin logic

Run the weekly BCO city report and flag cities below Alliance minimums

Assign leads as tasks to BCO Scouts in bulk every Monday

HubSpot Logging & Deal Creation (Sales)



Create callback tasks with exact date, time, and context notes

Set appointment booked disposition and trigger the thank-you
 automatically

Run the cleaning calculator and populate the deal price field

Associate contact, call, task, and meeting to the deal in a single action

Create the pre-presentation task and assign it to the correct presenter

Enroll prospects in the
 sequence when they request
-only follow-up

nt a second-strike ticket is created

nt an Alliance partner gives up a building

 for new applicants as they auto-populate

s

, Google Workspace, and RingCentral

mbers on browser-based tools and new systems

Document everything you build so it is not locked in your head

2+ years working with Node.js / JavaScript in a production environment

 workflows or CRM automation (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

Strong English communication — you will work directly with non-technical managers who need clear explanations

Ability to train non-technical users on browser-based tools — patience, clear documentation, screen recordings

Self-directed and proactive — you do not wait to be told what is broken, you find it and fix it

 API

, Zapier, or n8n workflow platforms

How to Apply



Do NOT send a generic cover letter. We will ignore it.



Step 1: Fill out the application form here: 
 — attach your resume/CV.



Step 2: Record a 5–8 minute video answering the four questions below. Upload it to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and paste the link in the form.



VIDEO QUESTIONS (all four are required):



Show us your screen and walk through a project where you built or deployed an AI agent or automated workflow. What did it do, what tools did you use, and what broke along the way? We want to see a real project, not a slide deck.

Our managers are not developers. Explain what an API is and why it matters — as if you are talking to someone who has never written a line of code. This tests whether you can communicate with our team.

You are tasked with building an AI agent that automatically sends a follow-up
 to a client 3 days after a deal moves to "Closed Won" in a CRM. Walk us through how you would build that — what tools, what steps, what could go wrong, and how you would monitor it.

What AI tools or frameworks have you used in the last 90 days? Show us something you are currently working on or learning. We want to see that you are active in this space right now, not that you took a course two years ago.

Applications with completed videos get reviewed first. Bonus points if you also include a GitHub, portfolio, or demo link.



Compensation & Growth



$1,200 – $2,400 CAD/month depending on experience and skill match

Performance reviews at 30, 60, and 90 days with potential raise based on results

Long-term role — we are building a permanent AI operations layer, not a one-off project

Autonomy — you own the technical stack. If something should be done differently, you tell us

Growth opportunity — as One Janitorial scales, so does the AI infrastructure and your role with it

title: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator



Position Overview:



We are seeking an experienced Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator with strong medical administrative skills to support our medical Referral Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the end-to-end referral process, ensuring accurate coordination between providers, insurance companies, and patients to facilitate timely access to care.



Key Responsibilities:



1.Process and manage incoming and outgoing medical referrals from initiation to completion



2.Coordinate referrals between primary care providers, specialists, and facilities



3.Verify insurance eligibility and referral requirements



4.Obtain authorizations when required for referred services



5.Follow up on pending referrals and approvals to prevent delays in patient care



6.Communicate with insurance companies, provider offices, and patients regarding referral status



7.Accurately document referral information and outcomes in the EMR/EHR system



8.Handle inbound and outbound calls professionally



9.Respond to patient and provider inquiries related to referrals



Requirements:



1.Must be a Nurse Graduate



2.Minimum 2 years of experience in a Referral Department, Referral Coordination, or similar medical administrative role



3.Strong understanding of medical terminology



4.Experience working with EMR/EHR systems (e.g., ECW or similar platforms)



5.Experience with insurance verification, referral eligibility, and payer communication



6.Experience handling patient and provider calls professionally



7.Fluent in English, both spoken and written



8.Available to start immediately



9.Must have own computer/laptop, stable internet connection, noise-canceling headset, and backup equipment



10.Confident in handling inbound and outbound calls

title: WordPress & Shopify Store Developer
description:
Arispheris is looking for a highly skilled Website Developer to join our team for a 3-month full-time project term, with potential for extension. This is a remote position, but we require a designer who can work independently, take initiative, and bring fresh, original creativity to the table—no AI-generated websites will be accepted.



If you thrive in an environment that values creative autonomy, attention to detail, and hands-on design skills, we’d love to hear from you.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for small business owners. We take pride in our in-depth recruiting process, ensuring that every professional we bring on board has the skills and drive to succeed.



We are actively expanding our design team and are looking for a Website Developer who excels at crafting fast and SEO ready websites to support clients in reaching their target audiences to increase revenue and website traffic. If you want to be part of a team that values true creative expertise, this is the perfect opportunity for you!



Requirements & Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Web development or related field, or relevant experience.

Minimum of 2 years of professional experience in website design and coding.

Website and software application designing, building, or maintaining, without AI.

Using scripting or authoring languages, management tools, content creation tools, applications, and digital media.

Conferring with teams to resolve conflicts, prioritize needs, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.

Directing or performing Website updates.

Developing or validating test routines and schedules to ensure that test cases mimic external interfaces and address all browser and device types.

Editing, writing, or designing Website content, and directing tea
mbers who produce content.

Maintaining an understanding of the latest Web applications and programming practices through education, study, and training. 

Back up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery.

Create daily logs of tasks completed for company and client reference.

Identifying problems uncovered by customer feedback and testing, and correcting or referring problems to appropriate personnel for correction.

Evaluating code to ensure it meets industry standards, is valid, is properly structured, and is compatible with browsers, devices, or operating systems.

Determining user needs by analyzing technical requirements.

Must be highly proficient in both WordPress, their respective plugins, & Shopify—you will be tested during the interview.

Strong sense of design composition.

Ability to create websites quickly and efficiently while maintaining a high standard of design quality.

Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with clients and teams.

Detail-oriented and capable of handling multiple projects at once while meeting deadlines.

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, and Asana is a plus.

Absolutely no AI-generated designs, portfolios, and websites will be considered.



Software & Platform Requirements:

Expertise in WordPress, Shopify and Elementor

Solid understanding of UX/UI principles

Proficiency in HTML and Python coding

Experience with affiliate marketing strategies

Proficiency with Shopify e-commerce platforms



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role (should you be hired for longer than nine months) 

Performance-based bonuses (available for long-term staff)

Work-life balance and flexible hours



As part of our team, you'll interact closely with clients, forming strong partnerships. You'll use your excellent communication skills to understand, negotiate, and ultimately create tailored solutions that exceed expectations. Does the idea of such meaningful client engagement unnerve you? If not, then you're ready to contribute to our shared vision. Here are the next steps to move forward.



***Very Important***

How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday this week for immediate hiring contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – WordPress & Shopify Store Developer"

Define a "backend developer staging area" in WordPress/ CPanel (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following in your response
:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original design work (Absolutely NO AI-generated websites. Wordpress & Shopify Shops ONLY)

List links to Wordpress & Shopify Sites you have designed.

One employer reference



Candidates that do not submit the requested items will not be considered. 



Once we receive your application, we will send you a scheduler to book your interview slot. During your interview, you will be required to demonstrate proficiency in Wordpress, Developer Backend, and Shopify Shop Setup.



If you’re ready to bring your creativity to a team that values real site developer expertise, we look forward to your application!

title: Storytelling, Journalism Content Writer (No AI Writers)
description:
Arispheris seeks an experienced and highly driven content writer responsible for creating written content for various platforms such as websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials for a 3-month full-time project. Their main goal is to create engaging and informative content that will attract and retain the attention of their audience and to create eye-catching marketing and publication materials for online-based businesses, without the use of AI. You will also be responsible for coming up with original content for marketing materials for the company and its clients. They must have excellent writing and communication skills, as well as a strong understanding of SEO principles to create written content that is optimized for search engines, independent of any AI platforms.



You will be collaborating with tea
mbers in the Philippines and clients throughout the US and Europe; therefore, you must have excellent communication skills, a flexible schedule, and the ability to meet and work during specified time zones.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for the small business owner. We provide in-depth recruiting processes to ensure that clients will have the best experience with our remote professionals.



We are actively seeking individuals with your abilities to join our team as we try to expand each of our departments. If you are interested in working remotely with a flexible schedule and demonstrating your creativity by crafting new and compelling written content for our company and diverse clients, then Arispheris is the company for you!



We seek a qualified candidate with the following qualifications for this position:

Bachelor's degree in English, journalism, marketing, or a related field

2+ years of experience in content writing, preferably in a professional setting

Excellent writing and editing skills, with a strong attention to detail, without the use of AI

Knowledge of SEO principles and experience optimizing content for search engines

Ability to research and gather information on various topics, without the use of AI

Strong communication skills and ability to work well in a team environment

Familiarity with content management systems (CMS) and basic HTML skills is a plus



Software & Platform Knowledge & Experience in the following:

Google Workspace

Canva

Microsoft Office Suites

Asana, Slack, Klayvio and Hubstaff

ClickFunnels and Shopfiy is a plus, but not required

Seeking: Expert Level in Excel/Google Sheets 



Job Highlights

Great compensation and benefits

Work-life balance

Work community incentives

Long-term career opportunity

Wonderful coworkers



Key responsibilities of a content writer include:



Researching and gathering information on various topics to create accurate and informative content, without the use of AI

Writing and editing engaging and SEO-friendly content for websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials

Collaborating with tea
mbers, including designers and SEO specialists, to ensure content aligns with brand guidelines and SEO strategy

Collaborating with tea
mbers and clients to determine content needs and goals

Analyzing and measuring the success of content through metrics such as website traffic and engagement

Participating in brainstorming sessions to generate ideas for new written content

Ensuring all content is proofread and error-free before publication, without the use of AI

Developing ideas and creating outlines for new content

Reviewing and proofreading content for accuracy and grammar errors

Utilizing SEO best practices to optimize content for search engines

Updating and maintaining content on websites and other platforms

Interviewing clients to get acquainted with their overall business identity and branding preferences to create compelling content for the company and clients

Creating a directory and maintaining the organization of all content materials for the company and for each client.

Ensuring that contents and final deliverables comply with company and clients' guidelines, specifications, and preferences, and achieving the highest standard of written quality, without the use of AI.

Maintaining an eagerness to expand individual skillsets by utilizing company resources and leaning into areas of improvement.



The candidate we’re looking for has:

Unrivaled eye for writing, storytelling, creativity, and resourcefulness

Can write without using AI

Capability to create social media captions, postings, publication materials, and similar content on the fly.

Ability to adapt their writing style to fit the tone and audience of their projects

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

Outstanding interpersonal skills and strong sense of collaboration with different departments

Ability to set priorities and meet deadlines

Comfortable providing suggestions to help the company and clients

Unparalleled attention to detail

Ability to work on multiple projects/clients simultaneously and adhere to strict deadlines

Ability to make evaluative judgments

Flexibility to create strategies quickly & effectively

Attentiveness & integrity

Friendly, emphatic, approachable, and professional demeanor

Ability to work well with internal and external parties



As a Content Writer, you may be entrusted with a variety of duties. The qualifications, responsibilities, and skill sets outlined above are merely a sampling of the duties that you will be responsible for. Job duties are expected to be carried out with minor to no supervision.



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role

Performance-based bonuses

Work-life balance and flexible hours



How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday of this and next week for immediate hiring, contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – Storytelling, Journalism, Writing Content Creator "

Share a story about your favourite food (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original written work (no AI-generated content)

Publications you have written and published (if applicable)

title: Xero Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist (Australian Experience Required)
description:

You will work alongside a local Australian accountant who will review your work monthly.

Assisting with EOFY financial reporting

Processing and checking payroll accuracy



Ensuring correct pay rates, hours, and entitlements

Maintaining clean and organised financial records

Strong understanding of:

Australian payroll compliance



Experience handling timesheets and payroll processing



High attention to detail and reliability



Strong English communication skills

This role is critical to business operations.

Only applicants with real Australian bookkeeping and payroll experience will be considered.





---

title: Automation Developer (n8n + AI Workflows)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced automation developer to build an MVP system using n8n that automates our AI-driven video content pipeline.



The system will generate scripts, create AI images, package assets for human editors, and manage task assignment and status tracking. Final video editing in CapCut is done manually by editors, so the focus is on orchestration, reliability, and clean handoffs.



This is a project-based role with potential for ongoing work.



Scope of Work (MVP)



The developer will build an n8n workflow that:



Accepts a topic/brief via webhook or Google Sheets



Generates video scripts using AI (ChatGPT / Perplexity)



Converts scripts into a structured shot list



Generates multiple images per shot using an AI image model



Organizes all assets into a clean “Editor Pack” folder structure



Generates supporting files (script.txt, shotlist.json, editor brief, optional captions.srt)



Assigns projects to editors and sends notifications (Slack/Telegram/Email)



Tracks project status in Airtable or Google Sheets



Handles async jobs, retries, and basic error handling



Manual steps (Veo3 animation + CapCut editing) are out of scope and will be handled by editors.



Tech Stack



n8n (core orchestration)



AI APIs (OpenAI / Perplexity)



AI image generation API (Gemini / Nano Banana Pro or similar)



Google Drive or S3 for file storage



Airtable or Google Sheets for tracking



Slack /
 /
 for notifications



Optional: small Node.js or Python helpers (ffmpeg, validation scripts)



Timeline & Budget:



MVP expected in 1–2 weeks

title: Online ESL Instructor
description:
Join Our Mission:



At Everest English School, our mission is to open up a world of opportunities for young learners. Unlike English education, which often focuses on test-driven learning, heavy on conventional grammar and translation, we are dedicated to equipping students with practical English communication skills. We bridge the gap between traditional education and the essential skills needed for global interactions.



We are seeking experienced and adaptable Online ESL (English as a Second Language) Instructors to teach Japanese students from Grade 1 to Grade 12. As our company continues to grow and innovate, we are entering a dynamic phase where teaching methods may evolve. Therefore, we value instructors who are open to ongoing training and flexible in adapting their instructional approaches. You will play a vital role in supporting students’ language development while helping shape the future of our learning programs.



Responsibilities:

Teach English to Japanese elementary, junior high, and high school students (ages 6–18) in a one-on-one online format

Deliver engaging, age-appropriate lessons tailored to each student’s needs and proficiency level

Adapt teaching strategies based on feedback, training, and evolving curriculum standards

Monitor student progress and provide regular feedback to both students and parents

Participate in training sessions and tea
etings to stay updated on instructional changes

Maintain accurate lesson records and communicate proactively with support staff



Qualifications:

Native or Near-Native English fluency with no requirement for Japanese.

Bachelor’s degree required (preferably in Education, English, or a related field)

TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification strongly preferred

Minimum of 2 years of teaching or tutoring experience, preferably with children and/or teens

Experience teaching Japanese students is a strong plus

Ability to deliver dynamic lessons and manage classroom behavior in a virtual setting

Openness to learning and adapting teaching methods through training and feedback

Proficiency with online teaching tools; reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace required



Working Hours:

Each workday will include at least two 25-minute lessons (totaling an hour or more per day).

The expected monthly working hours are approximately 24 hours.

Lessons can be scheduled between 5:00 AM and 11:00 PM (JST).

Priority will be given to those who can teach during weekday mornings and on weekends.



Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate based on experience, qualifications, and performance



If you are interested, we kindly ask you to submit the following two items.

Please be aware that missing either item will result in an incomplete application.

1.Your most recent resume

2. 1-minute self-introduction video in English



This will be an outsourcing (independent contractor) agreement, not a part-time employment contract.

title: Freelance Video Editor
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Freelance / Project-Based



Apply here: 



About the Role



We’re looking for a female video editor with a strong eye for storytelling, pacing, and

aesthetic—someone who understands the rhythm and style of modern YouTube vlogs,

especially in the travel, lifestyle, and women-focused content space.



You’ll be working closely with a content creator to bring engaging, personality-driven videos to

life—balancing cinematic 
nts with fun, relatable edits.



What You’ll Do

What We’re Looking For

Bonus If You Have

? Experience creating viral short-form cuts from long-form content

? Understanding of YouTube retention and audience engagement



Rate

? ?5,000 – ?15,000 per video (30–50 min vlog)

? ?800 – ?1,200 per short-form clip (Reels/TikTok)



Rates vary depending on experience, speed, and quality. Open to testing with a paid trial edit.



How to Apply

Please send:

? Portfolio (YouTube or Google Drive links preferred)

? 2–3 examples of vlog-style edits (travel/lifestyle preferred)

? Your typical turnaround time

? Your rate

title: Rockstar Customer Service
description:
???? Rockstar Customer Service & Dispatch Coordinator Needed, High Growth Role



We are not looking for a typical VA.



We are building a fast-growing service company in Florida, and we need someone who can operate at a high level, think fast, and handle real responsibility.



If you are organized, detail-oriented, and great with customers, this could turn into a long-term opportunity.





About Us:



We are Palmway Pools, a premium pool service company that services residential homes and Airbnb properties.



Our customers rely on us to keep their pools in perfect condition, especially when guests are staying at their homes.



That means communication, speed, and attention to detail matter at a very high level.







What You’ll Be Doing:



You will be the bridge between customers and our field technicians.



This is not just customer support, this is operations.



* Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

* Coordinate and dispatch technicians efficiently

* Handle scheduling, rescheduling, and urgent issues

* Communicate clearly with both customers and the field team

* Track jobs and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction

* Keep everything organized and documented





 Tools You’ll Be Using:



* WhatsApp

* Slack

* Go High Level (GHL)



What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone sharp.



* Excellent English, both written and spoken

* Experience in a service-based business (home services is a big plus)

* Strong attention to detail, you catch things others miss

* Fast thinker, able to handle pressure and make decisions

* Highly organized and proactive

* Great with customers, calm, professional, and confident

* Reliable and responsive, we move fast







This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You need constant supervision

* You miss details or forget tasks

* You are slow to respond

* You struggle with handling multiple things at once





## This Role IS For You If:



* You take ownership and solve problems

* You like being busy and moving fast

* You want to grow with a company long term

* You care about doing things right the first time





 Growth Opportunity:



This is a performance-based role.



If you perform at a high level, there will be opportunities for increased pay and more responsibility over time.



We reward reliability, speed, and attention to detail.





How to Apply:



To apply, send a message with:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with customer service and dispatching

3. A voice recording (30 to 60 seconds) explaining why you would be a good fit

4. The word *Palmway* at the top of your application so we know you read everything





If you are sharp, organized, and ready to grow, we want to hear from you.

title: Conversational AI –  Prompt Engineer
description:
AI Setter (One-Time Project)



Compensation

Paid upon delivery. If the work is strong, this becomes an ongoing relationship.



Schedule and Availability

This is a project-based engagement. No set hours. Deliver the work, get paid.



What You Will Own

We have a working AI setter built on n8n, Supabase, and ManyChat that automates Instagram DM conversations for online coaches. It runs but it is not good enough to rely on. Your job is to come in, identify what is breaking the quality and reliability, and fix it so it performs like a real appointment setter.



You Are a Fit If



You have hands-on experience with n8n, ManyChat, or similar automation tools

You understand how to engineer prompts for conversational AI agents — not just chatbots

You can read a sales conversation and understand what made it work

You are comfortable working with Supabase for memory and context management

You can ship a clean solution without needing hand-holding





To Apply

Send us two things:



Write a short prompt (under 300 words) that you would use to instruct an AI appointment setter on Instagram. Assume the prospect has just replied to a story and shown interest in working with a coach. Show us how you think.

Answer these questions in 2–3 sentences each:



What is your experience with n8n, ManyChat, or Supabase?

Have you worked with conversational AI agents before? What did you build or improve?

What is one reason an AI setter would fail to sound human, and how would you fix it?







Applications without both items will not be reviewed.

title: Cold Caller - Remote (Real Estate)
description:
Job Title: Cold Caller (Disposition Focused – Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners – U.S.-Based Real Estate Investment Firm

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commission + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners

Homeward Partners is a rapidly growing U.S. real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties and connecting them with cash buyers and investors.

We focus on efficiency, transparency, and results — delivering fair deals to sellers and profitable opportunities to investors.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Cold Caller with strong communication skills and a great U.S. accent to join our disposition team.

Your main responsibility will be to initiate contact with property owners, qualify leads, follow up with interested sellers, and assist in the deal disposition process — helping turn opportunities into closed contracts.



You don’t need prior disposition experience — if you’re confident, articulate, and eager to learn, we’ll provide all the training you need.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Qualification

Make outbound calls to property owners using company-provided scripts and tools.

Identify motivated sellers and qualify leads based on property condition, price expectations, and motivation level.

Accurately record call outcomes and update lead information in the CRM.



Disposition Support

Assist the disposition team in following up with warm leads and buyers.

Help schedule follow-up calls, send property details, and coordinate buyer communications.

Collect feedback from buyers and sellers to support faster deal closures.



Communication & Follow-Up

Maintain a high daily call volume with professionalism and persistence.

Develop rapport and build trust with property owners and investors.

title: Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Job Type: Full-Time | 44–48 hrs/week

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties directly from homeowners. Our mission is to create win-win solutions — helping sellers achieve peace of mind while building strong, ethical real estate deals that create value for everyone involved.



We buy distressed, inherited, pre-foreclosure, vacant, or problem properties — always focusing on transparency, empathy, and integrity.



As an Acquisition Specialist, you are the first or second voice sellers hear from us — the bridge between their challenges and our solutions.



Your Mission



Your job is to connect with motivated sellers, uncover their real needs, and help negotiate win-win purchase agreements for our company.

You’ll represent Homeward Partners with professionalism, empathy, and drive — moving conversations from first contact to signed contracts.



Key Responsibilities



Seller Outreach & Communication

Call, text, and
 inbound/outbound seller leads.

Build rapport and trust through active listening, not pressure tactics.

Qualify sellers based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and financial situation.

Ask diagnostic questions to uncover challenges like inheritance, title issues, or foreclosure risks.



Deal Analysis & Negotiation

Evaluate property values using tools like PropStream, Zillow, or Redfin.

Analyze motivation and market data to make fair, strategic offers.

Negotiate purchase agreements that align with company goals while maintaining win-win outcomes for sellers.

Submit qualified deals to the Disposition Team with all relevant details and comps.



CRM & Follow-Up Management

Maintain consistent CRM updates for every seller conversation, note, and offer.

Schedule timely follow-ups for unconverted leads.

Track and report KPIs such as calls made, quality conversations, offers presented, and contracts signed.



Team Collaboration

Coordinate with the Disposition Team to ensure deal handoffs are smooth.

Share feedback and insights from sellers to improve marketing and acquisition targeting.

Participate in sales meetings, training sessions, and roleplays to sharpen skills.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli or Podio

Dialer: CallTools, Readymode, Mojo, BatchDialer

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, ChatGPT (for comps)

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack, WhatsApp

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI dashboards



Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in real estate acquisitions, cold calling, or high-volume sales.

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).

Strong negotiation and problem-solving skills with a focus on empathy.

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with CRM documentation.

Comfortable working full-time U.S. hours (Central or Eastern Time).

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly.



Preferred Experience:

Prior experience talking to distressed or motivated sellers.

Understanding of real estate transactions, contracts, and title processes.

Familiarity with DISC personality profiles and rapport-based communication.



Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: Growth & Online Visibility Specialist (Miami Hospitality)
description:
The Mission:

We produce high-energy weekly events in Miami, but we have a "visibility" problem. We hear too often that locals and travelers simply didn't know our events were happening. 



We need a specialist to put us in their faces. Your mission is to position our website as the go-to authority for Miami nightlife and aggressively grow our social media, so we capture the attention of everyone visiting or living in the city. We aren't looking for a content assistant; we need someone to own our online presence and drive bookings.



Core Objectives:

• Website Positioning - Optimize our site so that when anyone searches for things to do in Miami, we are the first and most professional option they see.

• Social Media Growth - Execute a strategy that actually increases our follower count with locals and travelers—not just posting, but growing.

• Capture the Market - Build visibility specifically for people planning trips to Miami and the wave of locals looking for weekend plans.

• Drive Immediate Action - Funnel all that attention directly into our OpenTable and VIP reservation links.



Key Responsibilities:

• Strategic Website Positioning - Work with our web developer to rank for high-intent keywords (e.g., "Best Sunday Brunch Miami," "Nightlife Tonight") and ensure our site converts visitors into bookings.

• Social Media Execution - Lead our growth strategy to ensure our weekly events are impossible to miss for our target audience.

• Aggressive Advertising - Run Meta and Google ads targeting high-income zip codes, travelers, and local nightlife seekers.

• Google Business Optimization - Manage our presence so we show up at the top of the "Map Pack" for local searches.



What We Are Looking For:

• The "Visibility" Mindset - You understand that if they don't see us, they can't book us.

• Execution Over Vision - You prefer technical SEO and ad management over writing long strategy decks.

• Miami Market Knowledge - Understanding the Miami demographic and "vibe" is a major plus.



KPIs (How You’ll Be Measured):

1. Search Ranking: Movement to Page 1 for top Miami nightlife keywords.

2. Follower Growth: Consistent increase in local and traveler followers.

3. Inbound Inquiries: Growth in reservations and "How do I join?" DMs.



TO APPLY:

Subject line must include: Visible in Miami



Please include:

1. SEO Proof: A specific example of a site you ranked on Page 1.

2. Growth Proof: An account where you significantly increased the follower count and reach.

3. The First 7 Days: Tell us the first 3 things you would do to make sure a tourist landing in Miami sees our brand immediately.

title: Skilled Video Editor — Short Explainer Videos for AR Tech
description:
Company: Augmento — AR Studio (Dubai)



The gig:

We need someone who can turn our AR tech platform into short, clear, scroll-stopping explainer videos that make people go "oh, I get it now."



What you'll be creating:

1. Product explainers — showing how our WebAR platform works, step by step

2. Use case demos — AR for art exhibitions, galleries, and interactive treasure hunts (think Pokémon GO but for businesses and events)

3. Before/after and end result showcases — the "wow" factor of seeing AR in action



Style: Educational but punchy. Not corporate. Think mini-documentary meets tech demo — clean motion graphics, screen recordings with polish, and tight storytelling in 60-90 seconds.



Must-haves:

1. Portfolio with explainer or product demo videos (show us, don't tell us)

2. Strong motion graphics and compositing skills (After Effects, Premiere, or similar)

3. Ability to simplify complex tech into visual storytelling

4. Good pacing — no fluff, every second earns its place



Nice-to-haves:

1. Experience with AR/3D/tech content

2. Can work from screen recordings and raw footage we provide

3. Basic sound design and music selection sense

4. Comfortable with vertical (Reels/Shorts) and horizontal formats



Setup: Remote / project-based. Recurring work if we click.



To apply:

Drop your portfolio with 2-3 relevant video examples and a line on your turnaround time. If your reel is fire, we will talk fast.

title: Procurement Officer (for Amazon Private Label)
description:
About our company:



We are a European-based E-commerce company with 9 private label brands. We are looking for new products for which the packaging design is not done efficiently. We then make it more efficient, and this gives us a competitive advantage. For that development process, we sometimes have to change the product design, open new factory molds, or need to come up with other creative solutions. When our products are developed (by you in collaboration with a Chinese factory) and produced, our Supply Chain management from China to Europe works as follows: We usually have one 40ft EXW shipment per month from China to Europe that is set for a specific departure date. For this shipment, all orders from different suppliers (with production times ranging from 15-60 days) should arrive in time. All information (CI and PL) from all suppliers must be combined so that the customs clearance process is easy. This entire process is not documented in the form of SOPs yet, so we will have to create them together during the first month.



What We Are Looking For :



We are seeking an experienced professional who can take ownership of the entire product development and logistics process. (Initially a part-time role, with full-time opportunities potentially becoming available later.)



Your responsibilities will include:

- Product development and sourcing from China

- Minimum of 5 years of experience in private label procurement.

- Product quality control

- Ensuring efficient packaging and carton sizing

- Accounting support, including creating and verifying invoices

- Supply chain planning

- Managing lead times and shipping timelines (minimum 5 years of experience required).

- Supply forecasting and inventory management

- Managing international shipments



(You will be responsible for overseeing the full workflow—from product development to logistics coordination.)



You must have:



- At least 5 years of experience working with Chinese suppliers for FBA and private label businesses

- Advanced proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets

- Experience in data analysis

- Proven experience managing international shipments



What You Will Get:

Work mostly during Philippine hours to stay in contact with China, but you will also need to be available in the evening (until 22:00–00:00 PH time) to communicate with our European-based office.

title: Ecommerce Executive Assistant / HR Support
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Ecommerce Executive Assistant who will also support our HR/recruiting efforts. This is a versatile role — you'll be involved in day-to-day ecommerce operations as well as helping us find and interview great talent.



IMPORTANT: We are an AI-first team. You must be actively using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, etc.) in your daily workflow. We expect you to leverage AI to work faster, smarter, and more efficiently across all tasks — from writing product descriptions, to drafting interview questions, to analyzing data. If you're not already using AI heavily, this role is not for you.



Responsibilities:



Ecommerce Support:

- Manage and update product listings across platforms (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

- Process and track orders, handle customer inquiries and returns

- Coordinate with suppliers and fulfillment partners

- Monitor inventory levels and flag restock needs

- Assist with marketing tasks such as
 campaigns, social media scheduling, and basic graphic edits

- Research competitors, trending products, and market opportunities

- Use AI tools to draft copy, create content, analyze trends, and automate repetitive tasks

- Maintain and organize spreadsheets, reports, and SOPs

- Handle general admin tasks: calendar management,
 management, data entry, file organization



HR / Recruiting Support:

- Post job listings and screen incoming applications

- Conduct initial screening interviews and assess candidate fit

- Schedule and coordinate interviews with the team

- Maintain applicant tracking records

- Help onboard new hires with documentation and training materials

- Follow up with candidates throughout the hiring process

- Use AI to help draft job descriptions, evaluate resumes, and prepare interview scorecards



Requirements:

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Experience as a VA or EA, ideally in an ecommerce environment

- Must be actively using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) on a daily basis

- Comfortable conducting interviews over Zoom or Google Meet

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Proficient with Google Workspace, Slack, and common ecommerce tools

- Self-starter who can manage tasks independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



Nice to Have:

- Prior experience with HR, recruiting, or people operations

- Familiarity with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, or similar platforms

- Experience with project management tools (Asana, Trello, ClickUp, etc.)

- Experience with AI image generation or AI-assisted design tools



This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys variety in their work and wants to grow with a small, fast-moving team. If you're someone who takes initiative, communicates clearly, and thrives in a role where no two days are the same — we'd love to hear from you!



---



SCREENING QUESTIONS — Please answer the following in your application:



1. How many hours per week are you looking to work?



2. Which AI tools are you currently using, and how do you use them in your daily work? Please be specific (e.g., "I use ChatGPT to draft
s and product descriptions, Claude for research and summarization, Canva AI for social media graphics").



3. Which ecommerce brands or businesses have you worked with in the past? What platforms did they sell on (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)?



4. Do you have experience conducting first-round or screening interviews? If yes, how many have you done and what was your process for evaluating candidates?



5. Tell us more about your hiring/HR experience. Have you managed job postings, screened resumes, tracked applicants, or helped with onboarding? What tools did you use?



6. Describe a time you used AI to complete a task significantly faster or better than you could have done manually.

title: Male Voice YouTube Actor (Anime / General Voice Acting)
description:
About Viral Vault Studios:

Viral Vault Studios is a digital content creation company dedicated to producing educational and entertaining videos on YouTube. Our mission is to make online learning fun and engaging by creating content that captivates and informs global audiences. We focus on high-quality faceless YouTube videos across niches like anime recaps, celebrity health, and more.



Job Overview:

We are looking for a Male Voice Actor with strong skills in anime voice acting, character dubbing, and general voice over work. The ideal candidate can deliver expressive, dynamic, and high-quality audio for anime-style projects, digital media, and storytelling content. This role is perfect for someone passionate about anime characters, voice performance, and remote voice acting.



Key Responsibilities:

- Perform anime-style voices, character voices, and general voice overs based on script direction

- Record clean and high-quality audio using your home studio setup

- Interpret scripts, portray emotions accurately, and follow creative instructions

- Adjust performance based on feedback from the creative team

- Submit recordings on time and communicate any delays

- Maintain consistent audio quality and proper file labeling



Qualifications:

- Preferably male speaking fluent (Native-like) in English with a standard Neutral North American Accent.

- Experience in voice acting, voice over, anime dubbing, or character narration especially in YouTube

- Ability to perform a range of male anime voices—youthful, mature, energetic, soft, dramatic, comedic, etc

- Clear diction, strong emotion delivery, and acting capabilities.

- Must have a quiet recording environment and quality microphone

- Able to basic audio editing skills (Audacity, Adobe Audition, Reaper)

- Ability to follow directions and adapt quickly

- Reliable and responsive remote worker



How to Apply!

Please submit your resume plus 2 Vocaroo links using the scripts below.



Script One:

(Episode 1)

Yuki, a high school loser, complains about how he has to clean the classroom every morning. 

You see, bro is basically a roomba with legs, so everyone dumps the chores on him.

Little bit of context: In this world, all the girls can eat extradimensional peaches and get superpowers, while the boys get nothing except chores and back pain. 



So Yuki, like all the other weaklings, tries to stay useful. One friend asks him to fix a button, so he pulls out his hyper masculine sewing kit and repairs it like a sewing machine. 

We find out his sister taught him to sew by literally choking him out whenever he got it wrong. So yes, his drip and trauma are both hand-stitched.



As he’s walking home, Yuki wonders if his future is just dead end work and sewing forever. 

But before he can sink too deep into his life crisis, a thick fog rolls in and a strong gust throws him off his feet. When it clears, he gets surprise isekai’d, without the help of Truck-kun, into Mato, an alternate dimension full of monsters called Shuki.



If a civilian ends up in Mato, they should stay still and wait for the Demon Defense Force to rescue them. Yuki fully plans to do that, until an off-brand Hollow from Bleach appears. This apparently, is a Shuki. 

Dude runs, hits a dead end, and d
 to get himself killed by throwing a rock at the monster. Just when he starts imagining his body sliced up like sashimi, a girl riding on a Shuki swoops in and saves him.



This is Kiyoka, commander of the Seventh Squadron. She slices up the low-budget demons like she’s doing a murder speedrun any%. Her squad arrives soon after: Himari, who turns her arm into a literal Gatling gun, and Shushu, who can grow in size like Mt. Lady from My Hero Academia. 

Yuki realizes that among all the peach powered girls, these ones are the top shelf.



After they rescue Yuki, as well as a lost kid, more monsters appear. Kiyoka tries to fight but her borrowed “ride” breaks down like a Tesla Model Y. 



Desperate, she gambles and d
 to experiment with her powers. She tells Yuki she needs something from him. Yuki thinks it’s finally his 
nt—romantic? heroic? meaningful? Nope. She needs a slave.



She sticks out her finger, and Yuki goes monkey brain. He LICKS it. Immediately, he transforms into a demon beast that looks like a crossover of a Hollow and a Digimon. The squad is SHOOKT. 

Kiyoka hops on his back and commands him, like a Palworld trainer… if chaining your Pals and submitting them to slavery was your goal.



Yuki wrecks the monsters effortlessly, and even when a giant one appears, bro drills through it like a beyblade and saves the day. When he turns back into his lame ass self, Kiyoka d
 she wants to keep him permanently. But… Every time he fights for her, she must “reward” him. This time, it’s a kiss, and apparently, the more Yuki uses his monster-form, the greater the reward is. (Use the “hehe boah” 
) 



But even the prospect of such a heavenly reward system doesn’t take the baka out of the loser. 

Yuki a
 headbutts her in panic, but she still kisses him anyway, calling him a perv because her powers force her body to react no matter what. 



Yuki, freshly kissed and confused, d
 he wants to become a hero and avenge his sister. Kiyoka takes him to the Demon Defense dorm where he confidently introduces himself… only for the girls to call him “the new caretaker.” Apparently men aren’t allowed on the force. 



So his job is to clean, cook, and obey girls who have never even seen a boy before. Yuki’s dreams shatter into dust as he becomes the squad’s manservant. But at least Kiyoka still believes in him… kind of. She threatens to rip his manhood off if he misbehaves, so that’s supportive, in a way.



Script Two:

From getting into a fight for a bracelet…



To even challenge a well known rapper for a boxing ring to settle their problems.



This is the controversial case of TraxNYC.



Today, TraxNYC is a famous and debated name in the US jewelry scene, with a business valued at over $300 million. 



His journey began far from expensive gems or famous people. Long before the public attention and internet fame, he arrived in New York as a 7 year old refugee. During those years, he did not know much English and had no idea what his future held. The person who eventually created a huge luxury brand started out as a shy boy just trying to get by in a different country.



So, Max Agadjani was born in 1986 in Baku, Azerbaijan. 



At that time, the region was part of the Soviet Union. 



He grew up in a home that seemed very stable. His father was a detective who worked on hom
 cases. His mother was a reporter. They had two good jobs and steady money. Life looked safe on paper. However, the area changed quickly. In 1991, the Soviet Union fell apart. Azerbaijan became its own country almost overnight and political trouble took over. 



The streets that used to feel normal became hard to predict. 



Because the safety his family relied on disappeared so quickly, staying was a risk. Crime was rising. In 1992, his family made a major choice to leave.



("This is the world's first steak cooked on gold. Gold conducts heat faster than any other metal. Therefore, it heats up faster and you could cook the steak three times faster than you would on cast iron. That's why this steak is finished in minutes.")



("I got a 50 g 14k gold nugget that I'm going to give away for free to you. Sir, would you like this gold nugget? Of course not. Anyway, so we've got the gold nugget. Nobody's going to want it. That's one person. If this guy right here doesn't want it, sir, free, then we'll throw it in the wood.")

title: E-commerce Ads Strategist

What You’ll Do:

- Develop testing frameworks (creatives, hooks, angles, audiences)

- Analyze performance data and translate it into clear action steps

- Advise on scaling structure and budget allocation

- Help improve CTR, CPA, and overall profitability



What We’re Looking For: 

- Proven experience scaling e-commerce brands with paid ads

- Strong understanding of creative strategy and buyer psychology

- Ability to read data and make clear decisions

- Experience with Meta Ads (required)

- Strategic thinker — not just tactical executor



What We Offer:

To Apply:

Please send:

- Your approach to testing and scaling

- Your rate

title: SEO Specialist – Technical SEO & On-Page Optimization (Ongoing Role)
description:
We are a digital marketing and AI-focused agency looking for an experienced SEO specialist to join our team on a part-time or full-time basis.



This role is focused on technical SEO, on-page SEO, and implementation, not just reports and keyword research. You will be working directly on client websites to improve rankings, technical performance, and overall search visibility.



We are looking for someone who understands how SEO actually improves rankings, not someone who just follows checklists without understanding why.



What You Will Be Doing



Your work will include:



Technical SEO

Site audits

Fixing crawl errors

Indexing issues

Canonical tags

Pagination

Redirects

Broken links

XML sitemaps

Robots.txt

Site structure

Internal linking

Page speed improvements

Core Web Vitals improvements

Schema / structured data implementation (JSON-LD)

On-Page SEO

Optimizing page titles and meta descriptions

Heading structure (H1, H2, H3)

Keyword placement

Content optimization

Internal linking strategy

Image optimization (alt tags, file sizes)

URL structure

Improving pages to increase rankings and engagement

Implementation (Very Important)



You will not just write reports.

You will be expected to implement the changes on websites.



This includes working in:



WordPress

Shopify

Webflow

Wix

Squarespace

Other CMS platforms



You should be comfortable logging into a website and making the changes yourself.



What We Are Looking For



You must:



Have strong technical SEO knowledge

Understand on-page ranking factors

Understand how Google actually ranks websites

Be able to implement SEO changes on websites

Be detail-oriented

Be reliable and meet deadlines

Be able to communicate clearly

Be able to follow processes and checklists

Be able to work independently



We are looking for someone long-term, not just short-term freelance work.



Important SEO Knowledge Requirements



You should understand:



On-page ranking factors

Technical SEO

Internal linking and site structure

Schema / structured data

Page speed and Core Web Vitals

Mobile optimization

Indexing and crawling

How to improve rankings, not just traffic

The relationship between SEO, user experience, and engagement

How SEO affects AI search and modern search engines

Tools You Should Be Familiar With

Google Search Console

Google Analytics

Screaming Frog

Ahrefs or SEMrush

PageSpeed Insights

GTmetrix

Schema tools

WordPress SEO plugins (RankMath, Yoast, etc.)

Work Structure

Ongoing work

Multiple client websites

Mix of audits, implementation, and optimization

Some tasks will be small, some larger

Clear instructions and processes will be provided

You must be able to manage your time and complete tasks on schedule

mbers

title: Office Admin
description:
READ THIS FIRST We do not consider applications that ignore the "How to Apply" instructions at the end of this post. Attention to detail matters here. If systems, accuracy and follow-through aren't your thing, this role won't suit you.

THE ROLE

Crawford Plumbing & Air Conditioning is an Australian business committed to delivering reliable service, strong systems and a professional customer experience.

We're looking for an Office Administration to keep our operations organised, responsive and running efficiently behind the scenes.

This is not a light admin role. You will take ownership of dashboard reporting, performance tracking, job administration and system maintenance. Your work will directly impact customer experience, internal efficiency and leadership visibility over performance.

If you're someone who:

Keeps systems accurate and up to date

Notices errors in data and fixes them immediately

Enjoys building structured reporting processes

Takes pride in consistency and follow-through

…then this role is for you.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Update and maintain our sales and marketing dashboard with accurate, current data

Manage and maintain the performance standard tracker

Manage job administration in ServiceM8, including job creation, updates, scheduling support and records management

Maintain CRM accuracy through data entry and data cleaning

Create, file and present weekly reports on sales, deliverables, hours and task completion

Complete ad hoc administrative duties as required

WHAT YOU'LL NEED

Strong written and verbal communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

2+ years experience in an administrative, operations or support role

Experience with ServiceM8 or similar job management platforms (highly regarded)

Strong spreadsheet capability (comfortability with Google Sheets is highly desirable)

Excellent task management and follow-through

Ability to work independently and stay organised without constant supervision

SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE

The sales and marketing dashboard is updated consistently and reflects accurate, current performance data

The performance standard tracker is maintained without gaps or errors

ServiceM8 jobs are created, updated and administered in a timely and organised manner

CRM data is clean, current and reliable

Weekly reports are delivered on time and error-free

Leadership has accurate visibility over sales, activity and operational performance

Systems operate smoothly without constant reactive fixes

WHY JOIN CRAWFORD PLUMBING & AIR CONDITIONING

Clear systems and defined expectations

A growing trade business focused on professionalism and performance

A role where your organisation and structure genuinely matter

Opportunity to contribute to a business that values efficiency and accountability

HOW TO APPLY

We only consider applications that follow these steps:

Send a 60-second Loom video introducing yourself and why you would succeed in this role (generic recycled videos will not be considered).

Include your resume.

Use the subject line: Office Administration Application – [Your Name]

Send everything to

title: Virtual Assistant – E-commerce (Bol.com Operations)
description:
We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to support our 
 e-commerce operations. The VA will be responsible for product research, inventory management, and administrative tasks such as returns and review tracking.



Responsibilities:

1. Product Research & Sourcing

- Search for products on platforms such as AllExpress, Alibaba, and Temu

- Compare at least 3 suppliers per product

- Evaluate based on price, shipping cost, delivery time, and reviews

- Maintain product data in a structured sheet (Google Sheets)



2. Inventory Management & Purchasing

- Monitor inventory levels daily

- Place new orders when stock reaches minimum threshold

- Track orders (date, quantity, supplier, delivery time)

- Follow up with suppliers on delays



3. Returns Registration

- Record all returns daily in a tracking sheet

- Log reasons (damaged, defective, not as expected, etc.)

- Identity and report patterns



4. Review Tracking

- Check listings daily for new reviews

- Record number of new reviews and rating changes

- Flag negative reviews when necessary



Requirements:

- Experience with e-commerce is a plus

- Strong attention to detail and organization

- Good communication skills

- Ability to work independently

- Resume/CV must be attached with the application

title: Full-Time Accountant
description:
Horizon Case Management Corp™ – “Hope on the Horizon”

Remote | 40 hours per week (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern, Monday–Friday)



About Horizon



Horizon Case Management Corp™ delivers industry-leading brain-injury case-management services that place client care, ethics, and compliance first. As we expand, we are building a finance team that matches our clinical excellence. Join a mission-driven organization where your expertise directly supports clients rebuilding their lives.



Position Summary



Reporting to the COO and Billing Manager, the Full-Time Accountant owns day-to-day accounting, monthly close, tax compliance, and budgeting in?QuickBooks Online Advanced. This role is perfect for a seasoned U.S. accounting professional who seeks predictable morning hours and the satisfaction of designing tight, audit-ready books in a high-impact healthcare setting.



Key Responsibilities



Daily Operations



Post and categorize all bank and credit-card transactions; maintain a zero-balance clearing account.



Manage A/P and A/R workflows; perform daily cash-flow snapshot and variance alerts.



Budgeting & Forecasting



Maintain department budgets using QuickBooks Classes.



Generate a weekly budget-vs-actual dashboard with cost-saving recommendations.



Payroll Liaison



Reconcile bi-weekly payroll import from Rippling; verify deductions, PTO, and withholdings.



Month-End Close (5 Business Days)



Complete bank and credit-card reconciliations and all accrual, prepaid, and depreciation entries.



Produce P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash-Flow, AR/AP aging, and KPI pack for leadership review.



Tax & Year-End Support



Prepare 1099 filings, W-9 tracking, and sales-tax returns (MI and multi-state as needed).



Compile year-end workpapers for CPA; support S-corp 1120-S and state returns.



Internal Controls & Policy



Refine purchasing/expense-approval matrix; enforce segregation-of-duties and fraud-prevention checks.



Minimum Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or related field.



5+ years?progressive U.S. accounting experience, including year-end close.



2+ years?hands-on?QuickBooks Online Advanced?experience with multi-class reporting.



Working knowledge of U.S. payroll, 1099, sales/use-tax, and GAAP revenue recognition.



Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills (pivot tables, lookups); familiarity with 
 or Melio.



Strong written and verbal English; ability to present financial data to non-finance stakeholders.



Secure, private home office and 50 Mbps internet connection.



Commitment to HIPAA and data-privacy best practices.



Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:





Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Disposition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Disposition Manager (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners (U.S.-based Real Estate Investment Firm)

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions per Closed Deal + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in buying off-market residential properties and selling them to a curated network of cash buyers and investors. We focus on transparency, speed, and results — offering sellers quick, fair deals and investors high-value opportunities.



As our Disposition Manager, you’ll be responsible for turning signed contracts into closed deals — marketing properties, managing buyer relationships, negotiating assignments, and coordinating closings.



Core Mission

Your mission is simple: turn inventory into cash by selling contracts quickly and profitably while maintaining strong relationships with our investor network.



Key Responsibilities



Property Marketing & Buyer Outreach

Launch new deals to buyers within hours of contract execution.

Market properties using
 campaigns, CRM blasts,
 groups, Craigslist, and other investor channels.

Create engaging property listings and buyer packets with all key details (ARV, comps, rehab estimates, pictures).



Buyer Relations & Negotiation

Build, grow, and maintain a strong network of cash buyers and investor partners.

Negotiate assignment fees and contract terms that maximize company profit.

Follow up daily with buyers through calls, texts, and
s to create urgency and close quickly.



Transaction Coordination

Coordinate with title companies, escrow officers, and attorneys to ensure smooth closings.

Track deal progress, resolve title or buyer issues, and maintain clear communication across all parties.

Ensure accurate, compliant documentation for each transaction.



Market Research & Feedback Loop

Run comps using PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, and ChatGPT tools.

Stay updated on local market conditions, investor trends, and pricing benchmarks.

Provide insights to the acquisitions team for better property selection and pricing strategy.



Reporting & CRM Management

Keep CRM updated with all buyer interactions, notes, and statuses.

Track KPIs: time-to-market, engagement, contracts assigned, and closing ratios.

Generate weekly disposition performance reports for management review.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli, Podio, or InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: CallTools / BatchDialer / Google Workspace

Marketing:
/SMS tools, Canva, ChatGPT,
/Craigslist

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI Dashboards



Qualifications

1–3 years of experience in real estate wholesaling, dispositions, or investment sales.

Strong negotiation, relationship-building, and communication skills.

Confident with property valuation, comps, and real estate contracts.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and capable of working independently.

Self-motivated and results-driven, with a passion for closing deals.



Preferred:

Existing network of U.S. real estate investors and cash buyers.

Familiarity with ReSimpli, InvestorLift, or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with
 marketing for real estate.

Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: Advanced Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Advanced)



We're looking for a talented and detail-obsessed video editor to join our team. This is not a basic cutting-and-splicing role — we need someone who can create cinematic, high-energy content that stops people mid-scroll.



What You'll Be Editing

Content for coaching, personal brand, and online courses — including YouTube videos, short-form reels/TikToks, and promotional content.



The Standard We're Looking For

We love the editing style of creator Chloe Shih — if you've watched her videos, you'll know what we mean: clean motion graphics, snappy pacing, intentional color grading, smooth text animations, and a polished, premium feel throughout. You should be able to watch her content, understand the aesthetic, and replicate that level of quality.



You Must Be Able To:



Edit long-form YouTube videos (talking head + B-roll) with dynamic pacing

Create smooth text animations and lower thirds

Apply professional color grading to match a consistent brand aesthetic

Add motion graphics and visual effects (no basic jump cuts — we want elevated editing)

Edit short-form vertical content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) with trending caption styles

Sync music to cuts and transitions naturally

Work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holding



Software Requirements



Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or Final Cut Pro

Familiar with Adobe After Effects (for motion graphics)

Bonus: CapCut for short-form content



To Apply, Please:



Share your portfolio or YouTube channel featuring examples of your work

Share a specific video where you believe your editing is most similar to Chloe Shih's style

Tell us your rate and availability



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.
