title: UGC Content Creation
description:
We're Looking for UGC Creators to Grow With Us ????



We're a 7-figure brand on our way to 8 figures — and we're building the creative team that's going to get us there.

We're done with generic content. We want real creators who genuinely love what they do, know how to connect with an audience, tell a story, and move people to buy. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing

Creating authentic, high-converting video content for our brand — the kind of content that feels native, not forced. You'll have real creative freedom to bring your own voice and style to the table. We're not here to micromanage you. We want your perspective, and we trust you to bring it. That said, you'll never be left guessing — we'll always provide you with the right guidance to set you up for success.



What We're Looking For

You're based in the US, Canada, Australia, or the UK, since we sell to these markets and want content that genuinely feels local. You have an established following and a track record of creating content people actually engage with. You understand what makes content perform — hooks, pacing, authenticity, the whole package. And you take your craft seriously, even when it looks effortless on screen.



The Compensation Model

This isn't a flat-rate gig. We offer 30% of the organic revenue your content generates — tracked through our internal program so you always have full visibility into your numbers. No guesswork, no ambiguity. The better your content performs, the more you earn, and there's no ceiling on that. Creators who show up and deliver can build a genuinely meaningful income stream here.

Whether you're looking for a one-time project, something part-time, or a full-time creative home, we're open to all of it. You tell us what works for you — we're flexible, and we want this to be a good fit on both sides.



Why Work With Us

We built this around a revenue-share model that grows with your effort, not a flat fee that caps your potential. You'll have full transparency through our tracking program, so you always know exactly where you stand. You won't be just another vendor to us — you'll be a genuine growth partner. And as the brand scales, there's real room for the people helping us get there to grow right along with it.



To Apply

Send us your portfolio or some content examples, a quick note about your background, and your social handles. Most importantly, tell us a little about yourself and why you think we'd be a great fit together. We read every application and we're genuinely excited to find the right people.

title: UGC Content Coordinator
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-growing global ecommerce brand looking to scale our UGC (User-Generated Content) engine. Great content drives performance for us and we want someone who can consistently discover talented creators, build relationships with them and turn those connections into high-quality content collaborations.

This role is for someone who enjoys researching creators, reaching out to them, building partnerships and managing the collaboration process end to end. From identifying creators to coordinating product shipments and ensuring content is delivered as expected, you will play a key role in helping us scale our content production.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Creator Sourcing 

Identify high-quality UGC creators across various platforms

Research creators whose content style, audience and storytelling align with our brand.

Develop new methods and systems to continuously discover emerging creators.



Creator Outreach & Relationship Building

Reach out to creators and brand ambassadors to explore potential collaborations.

Clearly communicate our brand, our products and the type of content we are looking for.

Provide creators with detailed briefings and clear instructions on content expectations, deliverables, timelines, and usage rights.

Create detailed creator briefings based on campaign objectives and brand requirements.

Work with creators to agree on collaboration terms and conditions.

Ensure all necessary forms and agreements are completed and documented to avoid any future implications.



Campaign Coordination

Arrange and coordinate product shipments so creators have what they need to produce content.

Track shipments and ensure the products are successfully delivered to creators.

Ensure creators fully understand the creative direction and expectations.

Follow up consistently with creators to ensure content is delivered on time and meets quality standards.

Review submitted content and share it with relevant internal tea
mbers for further use and approvals.

Ensure end-to-end completion of creator collaborations, from initial outreach and briefing to content delivery and internal handover.



Process & Organization

Maintain a structured pipeline of creators for ongoing collaborations.

Track outreach, shipments, agreements, and content delivery.

Continuously improve the process for finding creators and managing collaborations efficiently.



What We’re Looking For

Strong communication skills and the confidence to reach out to creators and build relationships.

Highly organized and able to manage multiple creator collaborations at the same time.

Ability to give clear direction while allowing creators creative freedom.

A proactive mindset with the ability to constantly discover new creators.

Ability to ensure end-to-end completion of creator collaborations, from initial outreach and briefing to content delivery and final coordination.



Who This Role Is Not For

Someone who waits for creators to approach them instead of actively sourcing creators.

Someone who struggles with consistent follow-ups and coordination.

Someone uncomfortable with direct communication about expectations and deliverables.

Someone who is not detail-oriented when managing multiple collaborations.



Application Process

To help us understand how you think and communicate, please answer the following:

Which platform do you believe is the best for finding high-quality UGC creators and why?

Write or explain the first message you would send to a creator to start a collaboration with our brand.

title: Skilled Video Editor
description:
We're building a YouTube channel from the ground up and looking for someone to grow with it.



The channel covers geopolitics, business, history and technology — content that actually makes people think. The kind of videos that respect the audience's intelligence. This is not a faceless automation project. It's a real brand with a clear identity, a defined aesthetic, and a long runway if we do this right.



Some background on us: there's real success behind this team in affiliate marketing through YouTube, so we understand how retention works, what makes people click and what the metrics actually mean. We know what good looks like and we need someone who can execute it and eventually help push it further.



Right now the workload is part-time, roughly 10 to 20 hours per week. As the channel grows, so does the role. The goal is to build something with one or two talented people over time rather than burn through editors every few months.



On the technical side, solid video editing, photo editing and motion graphics are a must. If you can make something feel cinematic and purposeful rather than templated and generic, we'll get along well.



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a short test assignment, around one minute of edited footage. You'll be briefed fully on the style and direction before starting. There's no payment for the test, but the brief will be clear and your time won't be wasted with vague feedback.



If you take craft seriously, want to be part of building something instead of just clocking hours, and are looking for a working relationship that actually goes somewhere, throw your hat in the ring.

title: Packaging Compliance & Artwork Coordinator Food Products
description:
Hi There, I am looking for someone who has experience with dealing with Ingredients on packaging and food products. 



Some info typed up using AI below.



Regulatory Compliance & Label Management



Prepare and maintain accurate label content for all SKUs in compliance with FDA 21 CFR Part 101 and EU Regulation 1169/2011 (FIC)

Write and verify complete ingredient declarations, allergen statements, and nutritional information for both US and European formats

Ensure correct net weight, serving size, and nutrition facts panel formatting per market requirements

Cross-check all label content against current ingredient specifications and supplier documentation before any artwork is finalised

Track and implement label changes when formulations, suppliers, or regulations change

Stay current with FDA and EU food labelling regulation updates and flag any that affect our products

Artwork & Print File Preparation



Prepare or coordinate production-ready artwork files for packaging across all product lines

Review proof files against approved label content before sign-off — catching errors before they go to print

Manage file versioning and maintain a clean archive of approved artwork by SKU and market

Liaise with external designers or print suppliers to ensure files meet technical print specifications

Product Documentation & Order Sheets



Build and maintain a master order sheet for each product: carton dimensions, units per carton, gross/net weight, barcode, and market-specific variants

Keep carton detail documents (inner pack, master carton, pallet configuration) up to date and accessible

Create and update product specification sheets for use by buyers, distributors, and trade shows

Maintain a centralised, version-controlled document system so the team always works from the latest approved materials

Quality Control & Double-Checking



Build and follow a consistent verification checklist for every new or updated label before approval

Conduct a final review pass on all packaging before it goes to production — nothing ships without your sign-off

Flag discrepancies immediately and resolve them with the relevant stakeholder before proceeding.

title: Part-Time Social Media Coordinator
description:
OVERVIEW

Are you a creative, organised, and results-driven individual with a passion for social media and digital marketing?

This is a varied and hands-on role with a strong focus on social media execution. However, this isn’t just about posting content - you’ll play a key role in building brand awareness, establishing trust, and ultimately driving sales across a portfolio of small, owner-managed businesses.

title: Senior Technical SEO Consultant (Marketplace / Web App)
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a Senior Technical SEO Consultant to lead a full SEO audit, strategy, and roadmap for our existing event ticket marketplace web application.



Our platform is different from traditional ticket resale sites. Instead of allowing sellers to list tickets and wait for buyers, we buy tickets directly from sellers, provide an instant quote, and charge zero seller fees. This creates a strong value proposition in a very competitive market dominated by large, high-authority brands.



We need an SEO expert who can go beyond basic keyword research and help us improve:

• Search visibility and rankings

• Technical SEO health and crawlability

• Index coverage and discoverability

• Structured data and on-page optimization

• Authority, backlinks, and brand mentions

• AI discoverability across platforms like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity



This role will begin as a project-based engagement focused on audit and strategy. If Phase 1 goes well, there is potential for a long-term working relationship.



What We Need



We are looking for someone who can combine:

• Technical SEO expertise

• Content and on-page strategy

• Off-page SEO and authority-building

• Marketplace / dynamic site SEO experience



You should be able to:

• Conduct a full SEO audit across technical, on-page, content, performance, indexation, and off-page SEO

• Identify the highest-impact issues and prioritize what should be fixed first

• Create a clear SEO roadmap with effort, impact, and implementation guidance

• Work directly on implementation or collaborate closely with our development team

• Provide clear reporting and measurement plans so progress can be tracked



This is not a basic SEO role focused only on blog content or simple keyword research. We need someone who understands web apps, dynamic pages, structured data, and technical SEO for scalable platforms.



Scope of Work

Phase 1: SEO Audit & Strategic Report

Technical SEO



You will review areas such as:

• Crawlability, including robots.txt, sitemap(s), crawl depth, and internal linking

• Indexation issues, including coverage problems, canonicalization, and duplicate/thin pages

• URL structure, slug rules, and pagination handling

• Redirects, broken links, 404s, soft 404s, and redirect chains

• JavaScript SEO / rendering issues

• Core Web Vitals and site performance, especially on mobile

• Structured data / schema, including Event, Organization, Breadcrumb, and related markup

• International or geo-location handling, if relevant

• Trust and security signals such as HTTPS and mixed content



On-Page SEO



You will also review:

• Meta titles and descriptions for quality, uniqueness, and optimization

• Heading structure and content hierarchy

• Image SEO, including alt text, naming, compression, and lazy loading

• Duplicate content risks across similar event, venue, or location pages

• Internal linking opportunities

• Content quality and completeness across important page templates



Off-Page SEO / Authority Building



We want strategic and ethical recommendations to improve authority, trust, and visibility outside the website.



This includes:

• Backlink profile analysis

• Toxic or low-quality link review

• Competitor backlink comparison

• Link gap analysis

• High-quality link-building opportunities such as:

• Digital PR

• Guest posting

• Partnerships with event blogs, venues, and niche communities

• Industry directories and listings

• Affiliate or partner opportunities

• Resource page mentions

• External content distribution opportunities

• Scalable authority-building ideas such as venue guides, event calendars, original data/research, embeddable tools, widgets, APIs, or public datasets



Content & Keyword Opportunity



We also want recommendations on:

• Competitor keyword gap analysis

• Keyword mapping by page type and cluster

• New content opportunities such as guides, FAQs, categories, and venue/location hubs

• Improvements to existing content templates for marketplace-related pages



AI Discoverability



We want recommendations that can help AI tools and AI-powered search systems better understand and reference our site, including:

• Clear and well-structured page content

• Accurate schema / structured data

• Machine-readable pages such as About, FAQ, and How It Works

• Stable canonical URLs and page structures

• Proper crawl access to important pages while protecting sensitive areas



Deliverables



For Phase 1, we expect:

• A full SEO audit report with prioritized findings

• Severity and impact levels for each issue

• Recommended fixes with effort estimates

• A roadmap organized into:

• Quick Wins

• Medium Priority

• Big Rocks

• A measurement plan showing how results will be tracked

• Screenshots, examples, or supporting evidence where needed



Execution Plan



After the audit, we also want a clear plan that outlines:

• Recommended project phases

• Deliverables for each phase

• Estimated timeline per phase

• Fixed cost per phase

• Dependencies between SEO tasks and developer tasks



If You Can Also Help With Implementation



That is a strong advantage.



If implementation is included, we expect:

• Clear developer-ready tickets or checklists

• Validation steps before and after release

• Indexation, crawl, and performance checks

• Ongoing monitoring and reporting during implementation



Success Metrics



We will measure success through improvements such as:

• Increased index coverage and quality of indexed pages

• Better Core Web Vitals and mobile performance

• Growth in impressions and clicks in Google Search Console

• Improved rankings for target keyword clusters

• Fewer technical issues such as 404s, soft 404s, duplicate titles, and canonical conflicts

• Better eligibility for rich results, including event schema and breadcrumbs where applicable



Required Experience



To be a strong fit for this role, you should have:

• Proven experience conducting technical SEO audits for web apps, not just WordPress or content websites

• Strong knowledge of crawlability, indexation, canonicalization, sitemap strategy, and structured data

• Experience with marketplaces, dynamic websites, or programmatic SEO

• Ability to create developer-friendly recommendations and implementation tickets

• Hands-on experience using tools such as:

• Google Search Console

• Bing Webmaster Tools

• GA4

• Screaming Frog

• Ahrefs / Semrush

• PageSpeed / Core Web Vitals tools



Nice to Have



• Experience with Event schema

• CRO / conversion-focused mindset

• Scalable content strategy experience for large or dynamic websites



How to Apply



To be considered, please send the following:

• Links to 2–3 relevant SEO case studies, preferably involving marketplaces, web apps, or dynamic websites

• A short explanation of how you would approach the audit, including tools and steps

• Your proposed timeline and fixed-price estimate for:

• Audit + report

• Roadmap + execution plan

• Confirmation on whether you can implement the fixes directly or prefer to guide our development team



Important Note



Applications without relevant case studies or clear evidence of technical SEO results will not be reviewed.

title: Meta Ads Specialist
description:
Are you the best at what you do? Prove it.



We're not looking for someone who "dabbles" in Meta ads. We're not interested in generalists, agencies, or jack-of-all-trades marketers. We want the person who lives and breathes Meta advertising — someone for whom
 and Instagram ads 
't just a tool, they're a craft.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are building an internal marketing team and are looking for a dedicated Meta Ads Specialist to join us full-time in a long-term role. This is not a short-term gig. We're investing in the right person for the long haul — and we expect that investment to deliver real, measurable results.



You'll be working autonomously. There's no hand-holding here. You'll be trusted to own our Meta advertising strategy end-to-end — from creative direction and audience targeting through to campaign optimisation and reporting. You'll be accountable for performance, and we expect you to hold yourself to the same high standard we do.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Building, managing, and scaling Meta ad campaigns across
 and Instagram

- Developing and testing creative strategies (copy, visuals, video) to maximise performance

- Conducting deep audience research and segmentation

- Monitoring, analysing, and optimising campaigns with a relentless focus on ROI

- Reporting on results with clarity — no vanity metrics, just numbers that matter

- Staying ahead of Meta's algorithm changes, policy updates, and new ad formats

- Identifying opportunities to scale what's working and cut what isn't — fast



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



This role is for you if:

- Meta ads is your primary speciality — not one of many skills, but THE skill

- You have a proven track record of results you can demonstrate with real data (case studies, screenshots, reports)

- You can work independently without needing to be managed day-to-day

- You're a self-starter who takes initiative and solves problems without waiting to be told

- You obsess over performance and genuinely care about improving results

- You understand the full funnel — awareness, consideration, and conversion

- You're comfortable managing ad spend and making data-driven decisions under pressure



This role is NOT for you if:

- You're a generalist marketer who runs Meta ads on the side

- You rely on templates and set-and-forget strategies

- You need constant oversight or direction

- You can't back up your claims with real results



THE DETAILS



- Employment Type: Full-Time, Permanent

- Schedule: Monday to Friday

- Location: Remote (work from anywhere)

- Salary: Competitive — based on experience and results



THE HIRING PROCESS



Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a real-world practical assessment — a live task that reflects the actual work of this role. We're not interested in what you say you can do. We want to see what you can actually do. Come prepared to show your best work.



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application to 
 with the subject line: Meta Ads Specialist Application



Your application must include:

1. A brief introduction — who you are and why you're the right person for this role

2. Evidence of results — case studies, campaign data, screenshots, or reports from previous Meta ad campaigns you've managed

3. A summary of the types of budgets and industries you've worked with



No portfolio, no results, no application.

title: Executive Assistant to the General Manager — Part-Time (3 hours/day)
description:
Executive Assistant to the General Manager — Part-Time (3 hours/day)

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9:00am–12:00p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

Pay: $120 USD per week (paid weekly)



Be the GM’s morning engine. This is a short, high-impact role for someone who is ruthlessly organised, an excellent writer, and brilliant at turning
s and decisions into completed actions. You’ll own inbox triage, priority-setting, and follow-up so the GM can focus on strategy.



The role — quick and honest

You’ll spend three focused hours every morning owning the GM’s inbox and calendar: collate the day’s top items, run a daily Teams catch-up with the GM to set priorities, send replies on the GM’s behalf, and chase owners until tasks are done. You do not need to attend other meetings — your job is to move things forward, not sit in them.



Key responsibilities:

- Triage the GM’s inbox: identify urgent items, draft and send responses on the GM’s behalf, and escalate when required.

- Run a daily Teams catch-up with the GM (within 9–12) to agree priorities and actions.

- Create clear action lists and maintain a simple TAC (Time Action - Calendar) tracker — chase owners and log updates until completion.

- Protect the GM’s time: manage calendar requests, block strategic time, and categorize meeting requests.

- Draft and send clear, on-brand communications from the GM to the business.

- Hold teams accountable to deadlines across Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Finance.

- Maintain strict confidentiality and good judgement.



Must-haves:

- Proven EA or senior admin experience in wholesale / fashion / accessories / footwear.

- Exceptional written English — tidy, decisive, persuasive.

- A process-first mindset: you build simple systems and run them relentlessly.

- Comfortable sending
s on behalf of the GM and escalating professionally.

- Tool fluency: Outlook/Gmail, Teams, Slack, Asana (or similar). Comfortable referencing PLM/ERP notes.

- Availability 9:00am–12:00p
lbourne time, Mon–Fri.

- High integrity and willingness to undergo background checks if required.



Nice-to-haves:

- Experience with SAP, PLM or retail ERPs.

- Practical experience enforcing TAC / deadline compliance.

- Natural cultural champion — someone who makes team comms clear, consistent and on-brand.



What is a TAC (brief)

TAC = Time Action Calendar. It’s the launch timetable with owners, deadlines and dependencies. You’ll keep a short TAC tracker every morning so the GM only sees what truly matters.



Success in the first 90 days

Day 1–30: Daily inbox triage is consistent; morning catch-ups are tight and actionable.

Day 31–90: Deadlines are being hit more often, follow-ups are tracked and closed, and the GM has more uninterrupted strategic time.



Practicals & how to apply

Hours: 3 hours/day (9:00–12:00 Melbourne time).

Pay: $120 USD/week, paid weekly.

Contract: Ongoing (start ASAP / by mutual agreement).

Location: Remote — must work Melbourne hours.



To apply:

- Send a short cover note (2–3 sentences), CV, and a 2–3 bullet example of a process you implemented that improved deadline compliance.

- Confirm you can: work 9–12 Melbourne time, send
s on behalf of the GM, and accept the weekly pay of $120 USD.

- Answer screening questions below:

1. Briefly describe your wholesale/fashion/EA experience.

2. Which tools do you use for inbox triage and task tracking?

3. One example of how you’ve "branded" or improved team communication.



We need an excellent communicator and cultural champion — if you make leadership look better and deadlines happen, apply.

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME & Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

title: Part?Time Local SEO Virtual Assistant – Metro Field Services

title: Marketing & Copywriter VA
description:
Summary

About Us

I run a boutique digital marketing agency specializing in conscious, purpose-driven brands. I work with clients who are making a positive impact in the world through herbal medicine, personal development, and transformational education.



The work includes
 marketing campaigns, sales pages, course launches, and brand messaging that feels authentic and human, and focuses primarily on digital products or programs.



About You

You're a skilled copywriter who understands how to write copy that converts without sounding robotic or overly "salesy." You have a knack for capturing different brand voices and can shift between tones seamlessly. You're also naturally organized, proactive, and genuinely enjoy helping someone stay on top of both business and life.



You understand how to work with someone who has ADHD which means you are able to help manage me with clear systems, regular check-ins, gentle accountability, and a collaborative approach to staying organized.



For starters, I need someone a few hours a week to help me get and stay organized and to be able to pass off the tasks that are creating blocks (specifically, copywriting). Once I'm able to get to more organized and if I can find someone to help me manage a team, this position could involve long term growth with the business.



What You'll Do

Copywriting (50% of role)



Write and edit
 sequences for client campaigns (launches, promotions, nurture sequences)

Create sales page copy, landing pages, and promotional materials

Adapt tone and messaging to match each client's unique brand voice

Write copy that sounds human and not AI (at most, AI-generated as template but with a strong review and understanding of how NOT to sound AI)

What Success Looks Like



 campaigns that get opened, read, and convert – with copy that sounds human and on-brand

Nothing falls through the cracks – deadlines are met, tasks are tracked, clients are happy

I feel supported, organized, and able to focus on my zone of genius

Clear, proactive communication that keeps everything moving forward



Requirements



Strong copywriting portfolio – please include samples of
 campaigns, sales pages, or similar work

Excellent written English with attention to grammar, tone, and flow

Experience writing for wellness, sustainability, or conscious lifestyle brands (preferred)

Comfortable with project management tools and willing to learn our systems

Self-directed and proactive – you spot what needs doing and take initiative

Comfortable working remotely with communication



Nice to Have



Experience with
 marketing platforms (Kajabi, Keap, etc.)

Understanding of sales psychology and conversion copywriting

Familiarity with conscious/ethical/spiritual brand communities

Background as a VA or executive assistant

title: Product Lister
description:
We're Hiring: Experienced Product Lister (Fashion E-Commerce | Remote | Shopify)



Are you a Shopify-savvy product lister who knows fashion dropshipping inside and out? Do you move fast, work smart, and know your way around every tool in the e-commerce stack? Then we'd love to hear from you.



About the Role

We're a growing fashion dropshipping brand targeting the US market, and we're looking for an experienced Product Lister to help us build out and maintain a high-converting Shopify store. This is a flexible, remote role for someone who's genuinely passionate about e-commerce and knows what great product listings look like.

What You'll Do



Upload, format, and optimize product listings on Shopify from start to finish.

Build accurate and well-structured size charts using Kiwi Sizechart.

Write clean, conversion-focused product descriptions tailored to the US fashion market.

Manage and organize product data efficiently using Google Sheets.

Communicate and collaborate with the team via Slack.

Use AI tools to speed up and improve your workflow where possible.

Maintain consistency in quality across all listings — no shortcuts.



Who You Are

? Minimum 2–3 years of hands-on experience in e-commerce product listing.

? Solid Shopify knowledge — you know the platform inside and out.

? Direct experience with fashion dropshipping (this is a must).

? Experienced with Kiwi Sizechart for size chart setup and management.

? Comfortable working with AI tools as part of your daily workflow.

? Proficient in Google Sheets and Slack.

? Extremely flexible — you adapt quickly and don't need hand-holding.

? Detail-oriented, fast, and reliable with a strong eye for presentation.

? Excellent written English — your listings should read professionally.



About Us

We're a remote, results-driven team running a fast-growing fashion dropshipping store in the US market. We care about quality, speed, and building something that lasts — and we want people around us who feel the same way.

What We Offer



Flexible working hours — results matter, not your schedule.

Long-term collaboration with a motivated remote team.

Competitive pay with room to grow as the brand scales.

A dynamic, no-nonsense work environment where your work directly makes an impact.





To show that you've read this entire job post, reply on the jobpost with the word: Green.

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Senior Finance Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Analyst, you’ll turn messy financial and operational data into clear, actionable insights. You’ll work closely with leadership to provide strategic analysis, support decision-making, and ensure financial reporting is accurate and insightful. This is more than bookkeeping, you’ll be analyzing, forecasting, and modeling to drive real business impact.



Key Responsibilities

-Take raw or messy data from multiple sources and turn it into accurate, meaningful financial reports.

-Prepare monthly and ad hoc reports, including P&L, gross profit, EBITDA, and cash flow analysis. Provide variance, trend, and KPI insights, including LTV-CAC and other commercial metrics.

-Build and maintain financial models to support budgets, forecasts, and strategic decision-making.

-Work with Marketing, Operations, and other teams to align on budget, strategy, and performance improvements.

Identify opportunities to streamline reporting, implement Excel/automation tools, and enhance financial workflows.

-Contribute to special projects, cost analysis, and other initiatives that influence the company’s financial future.



What Sets You Apart

-Advanced Excel and data manipulation skills (formulas, pivot tables, macros)

-Strong understanding of key financial metrics: EBITDA, gross profit, cash flow, LTV-CAC

-Ability to translate complex data into actionable insights

-Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

-Curious, proactive, and solution-oriented



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Consistent monthly income

-Health insurance coverage

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive, and collaborative team culture



Please ensure to submit your resume with your application. Thank you

title: SEO & Backlinks Specialist (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About the Role



We are building multiple digital platforms under one company (travel, freelancing, insurance, and marketplaces). One of our platforms, Checklokal, is already live and expanding fast.



We are looking for a results-driven SEO & Backlinks Specialist who can take ownership of link building, outreach, and SEO growth, not just execute tasks, but deliver measurable traffic improvements.



This is NOT a beginner role.



If you cannot show proof of past results, do not apply.



What You Will Do:



1. Link Building (Core Responsibility)

Guest post outreach: 4–6 quality pitches per week

Build and maintain a pipeline of publishers

Secure live backlinks (not just outreach)



2. Directory & Citation Building

Month 1: 30–50 directory submissions

Ongoing: 10–15/month

Ensure consistency (NAP, formatting, indexing)



3. Community & Forum SEO

Reddit (r/digitalnomad, r/backpacking, r/solotravel)

Travel forums and communities

Focus on value-first posting (no spam links)



4. On-Page SEO Support

Review page structure and internal linking

Optimize meta titles, descriptions, and headings

Identify SEO gaps across pages



5. SEO Tracking & Reporting

Monitor Google Search Console + GA4

Track keyword growth, impressions, clicks, traffic

Submit weekly performance reports



6. Influencer Outreach

Build database of 100+ micro-influencers (5K–150K followers)

Conduct outreach using templates

Track responses and collaborations

What You Will Be Measured On



This role is performance-based, not task-based.



You will be evaluated on:



Number of live backlinks secured

Quality of links (DR, relevance)

Growth in organic traffic (GA4)

Keyword ranking improvements

Outreach response rates

Consistency of weekly reporting



Mandatory Application Requirements (READ CAREFULLY)



If you do not follow this, your application will be ignored.



You MUST include:



1. Your CV (PDF or link)

2. Proof of work with RESULTS:

Screenshots from Google Search Console or GA4

Before/after traffic growth

Keywords ranked

Backlinks you personally built

3. 2–3 specific examples of websites you worked on



Disqualified immediately if:

You send a generic application

You provide no proof of results

You list “SEO skills” without evidence



How to Apply



Submit your application on OnlineJobs.ph with:



Subject line:

SEO RESULTS – [Your Name]



Include:



CV

Proof of results (screenshots/links)

Examples of backlinks you built

Final Note



We are hiring for execution and results.



If you can build links that drive traffic, you will do very well here.

If not, this role will not be a fit.

title: Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator
description:
Position Summary:

The Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator is a full WFH remote setting and is responsible for ensuring timely, accurate, and compliant submission of individual case safety reports (ICSRs) related to clinical trials. This role supports pharmacovigilance and clinical operations teams by managing safety documentation, coordinating with stakeholders, and maintaining regulatory compliance in accordance with ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other global regulatory requirements.



Key Responsibilities:

• Coordinate the collection, tracking, and submission of ICSRs and periodic reports to partners, regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators.

• Maintain safety reporting logs, ensuring data accuracy and completeness.

• Monitor safety reporting timelines and escalate delays or issues to appropriate stakeholders.

• Collaborate with clinical teams, CROs, and vendors to ensure proper documentation and reporting of safety events.

• Assist in the distribution and submission of safety-related documents, including Development Safety Update Reports (DSURs), line listings, and other deliverables as required.

• Support audits and inspections by providing documentation and responding to queries related to safety reporting.

• Ensure compliance with applicable global regulatory requirements and internal SOPs.



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Nursing, Pharmacy, or a related field.

• 1–3 years of experience in clinical trial safety reporting, pharmacovigilance, or clinical operations.

• Knowledge of MedDRA and WHO Drug Dictionary coding.

• Knowledge of ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other relevant regulatory guidelines.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: AI Visual Content Creator – Learning & Training Content (Hourly / Remote)
description:
We produce professional, character-driven learning content for financial professionals in Hong Kong. We design realistic workplace scenarios, such as compliance dilemmas and corporate team dynamics, delivered in English. We leverage advanced AI tools to generate visually stunning and stylistically consistent training materials.



Basic Qualifications:

Exceptional Creative Eye: Proven ability to assess visual quality, maintain strict character consistency, and independently iterate AI outputs.

Technical Proficiency: Hands-on experience with AI image and video generation tools (e.g., Midjourney, Leonardo AI, Hedra).

Language Competency: Professional English reading level required to comprehend scripts.



How to Apply:

Please submit a brief cover letter and the following three items to 
 applications will not be considered.



Task 1: Portfolio

Submit 8–12 examples of your AI-generated artwork. Demonstrate a broad range of characters, professional environments, and emotional moods. Include brief notes identifying the AI tools utilized for each piece.



Task 2: Prompt Engineering Task (Written only; no images required)

Scenario: A senior manager privately and constructively addresses a junior colleague's compliance mistakes. Write a sequence of 4–5 text prompts that would generate the visual storyboard frames for this 60-second segment. For each prompt, include a one-line story description and one specific quality-control check you would use to evaluate the output.



Task 3: Art Generation Task (Generate still images only)

Scenario: A meeting where a senior colleague critiques a junior, evolving from "neutral tension" to "visible discomfort," ending in "resolution/relaxed posture." Generate 3–5 still images demonstrating this emotional progression while maintaining strict character and environmental consistency. Include a brief note explaining your creative process and what specific elements you would refine given more time.

title: Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer - Amazon Germany
description:
Compensation: $5.00 USD / Hour (~€4.50 EUR / 50,000 PHP Monthly) + Performance Bonuses

Location: Fully Remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, Flexible Hours

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring an experienced Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer for a growing Amazon FBA business based in Germany currently doing €60-80K/month in revenue. Sourcing is your primary job, the majority of your time will be spent finding and evaluating profitable leads on a consistent daily basis. If you're someone who's great at sourcing and can work independently without being micromanaged, this role is for you.

 

Responsibilities?

Source profitable OA leads daily using Keepa and seller storefronts

Evaluate leads using sales rank history, price trends, offer counts, and margin analysis before submitting

Hit daily and monthly spend targets with minimal supervision (starting goal: €10K/month)

Work confidently with German product listings using Chrome translator and AI tools to verify product details and sizing

Keep lead quality consistent and make sure submitted leads meet the criteria set by management

Flag and inform management of any red flags such as sudden price drops, spiking offer counts, or anything that could affect lead quality or account health

Bring your own sourcing approach to the table, if something works better than what we're doing, we want to know

 

Requirements

2+ years of hands-on OA sourcing experience for Amazon FBA

Strong proficiency with Keepa, able to read charts and predict where price and offer count are heading

Knows how buy box rotation works and how FBA vs FBM affects it

Able to spot red flags right away such as brands selling on their own listing, misbranded products, and IP complaint-prone items

Experience using Seller Amp (SAS) or similar tools for profit and ROI calculations

Experience with multiple sourcing methods such as storefront stalking, reverse sourcing, and brand sourcing

Able to use Keepa Product Finder with the right filters to find leads from scratch

Knows how to use coupon code extensions and newsletter signups to maximize discounts when sourcing

Able to estimate rough profitability without a tool, just from the buy box price and buy cost

Comfortable working with non-English listings using translation tools and AI

Self-directed: you show up, do the work, and don't need someone checking in on you constantly

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work setup

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience sourcing specifically for Amazon European marketplaces

Familiarity with German product categories and seasonal trends



To Apply

title: Partnership for Headhunters: Long-term Bulk Recruitment of Online ESL English Teachers
description:
We are an educational institution with over ten years of industry experience and a large stable student base. As our business continues to expand, we have launched a new online English tutoring platform. We are now recruiting a large number of qualified online English teachers from the Philippines.

We sincerely extend a cooperation invitation to headhunters and agencies with high-quality, stable and large-scale teacher resources. We welcome partnership discussions to achieve resource complementarity and long-term win-win cooperation.



Recruitment Requirements

1.Able to steadily supply Filipino teachers in bulk, flexibly adjust the number of candidates according to our needs, and support long-term continuous cooperation.

2.All provided Filipino teachers must have fluent oral English proficiency and hold official teaching certifications such as TESOL or TEFL .

3.Teachers are required to have one-on-one English teaching experience (online teaching experience is preferred). They should be skilled in one-on-one teaching for kids and children, with excellent classroom interaction and communication abilities.

4.Cooperate with us in arranging trial lessons and qualification verification to ensure authentic personal information and qualified teaching capabilities.



Our Cooperation Advantages

1.Stable & High Demand: We own a large student group with consistent booking needs throughout morning, afternoon and evening peak hours.

2.Efficient Cooperation Process: Dedicated communication channel and exclusive staff for screening and follow-up. Transparent review procedures greatly improve cooperation efficiency.

3.Guaranteed Commission Payment: Commission is settled per successfully onboarded teacher, paid every two weeks with no payment delays.

4.Long-term In-depth Collaboration: Exclusive partnership will be established for outstanding partners with high-quality resources and efficient services, with priority access to all our recruitment demands.



Requirements for Partners

1.Individual recruiters or formal agencies with direct access to Filipino teacher resources, no multi-level intermediaries, ensuring stable supply and reasonable cost.

2.Capable of preliminary screening, including qualification checks and oral assessments, to provide pre-qualified candidates and reduce communication costs for both sides.

3.Cooperate with trial lesson assessments, pre-service training arrangements, and daily coordination such as schedule adjustments and basic issue feedback.

4.Uphold integrity in cooperation. Ensure all teacher information and certifications are authentic; no fake credentials or inexperienced teachers shall be recommended. All cooperation terms must be strictly followed.

5.Conduct internal screening to exclude teachers with poor work attitude and inactive communication habits.

6.Serious inquiries only.



Cooperation Scope & Services

1.Partners provide bulk resumes and basic information of Filipino teachers that meet our standards in terms of quantity, teaching experience and course adaptability.

2.After we complete resume screening and online interviews to confirm employment, partners assist with follow-up onboarding coordination.

3.Partners maintain daily basic communication with teachers to ensure smooth teaching operations.

4.Both sides conduct regular reviews to adjust teacher supply quantity and optimize cooperation procedures according to business development.



Cooperation Process

1.Demand Communication: Partners contact us and introduce their resource scale, teacher qualifications and supply capacity; both parties confirm detailed cooperation terms and models.

2.Resource Verification: Partners send sample teacher profiles for our qualification review and trial lessons to verify overall resource quality.

3.Trial Cooperation: Start small-scale trial cooperation to run in workflows. After confirming teaching quality and service performance, formal long-term bulk recruitment cooperation will be launched with commission settlement executed as agreed.



Note

Interested partners please attach a brief introduction of your Filipino teacher resources (scale, certification proportion, supply capacity, etc.) when contacting us for quick review and follow-up arrangement.

title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Freelance, Ongoing Work)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable, practical, and reliable full-stack web developer to support a digital marketing and AI-driven agency on an ongoing freelance basis.



This is not a narrow role. We need someone versatile. Someone who can move quickly between platforms, solve problems without hand-holding, and execute tasks efficiently across a wide range of websites and technologies.



Think of this as a “utility player” role for web development. You will be working across multiple client websites, platforms, and tools, often switching between tasks day-to-day.



What You Will Be Doing

Your work will vary depending on client needs, but will typically include:



Website Builds & Edits

Building or assisting with websites across platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Wix, Squarespace, and others

Working with modern tools like Replit, Lovable, and AI-assisted builders

Implementing themes, templates, and design updates

Uploading and formatting new pages (often SEO-optimised content) so they match the existing design and UX



Technical SEO Implementation

Fixing on-page SEO issues (meta tags, headings, internal linking, canonicals, pagination, etc.)

Implementing structured data / schema markup (JSON-LD)

Improving site speed and Core Web Vitals

Resolving crawl errors, broken links, indexing issues

Supporting SEO and content teams with technical changes



CMS & Platform Work

Logging into and working across various CMS platforms without needing extensive guidance

Installing and configuring plugins or apps where needed

Troubleshooting issues across different hosting environments



General Development Tasks

Minor front-end and back-end fixes

Custom code adjustments (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP where required)

Debugging issues quickly and efficiently

Ensuring sites are responsive, clean, and functional across devices



Conversion & UX Improvements

Making practical improvements to layouts and user flows

Supporting CRO initiatives such as improving engagement, dwell time, and usability

Ensuring pages load correctly and provide a smooth experience

What We Are Looking For



We are not looking for a beginner or someone who needs constant direction.



We are looking for someone who:

Is experienced across multiple CMS platforms

Can figure things out independently

Works quickly without compromising quality

Communicates clearly and concisely

Is comfortable switching between very different types of tasks

Has strong attention to detail

Understands the relationship between development, SEO, and user experience



You should be comfortable being dropped into an unfamiliar site and getting to work.



Technical Requirements

You should have working experience with the following:

HTML, CSS, JavaScript

At least one back-end language (PHP preferred for WordPress environments)

WordPress (essential)

Shopify (important)

Experience with Webflow, Wix, Squarespace, Git or similar builders

Basic understanding of hosting, DNS, and website environments

Familiarity with SEO fundamentals (highly important)



Bonus if you have:

Experience with WooCommerce

Experience with page builders (Elementor, Divi, etc.)

Experience with AI website tools (Replit, Lovable, etc.)

Experience implementing schema and technical SEO fixes



How We Work

Tasks will be assigned as needed, sometimes small, sometimes more involved

Some work will be urgent; some will be scheduled

You will often be given clear instructions, but you are expected to think independently

Communication will typically be via Slack or



Hours & Pay

Ongoing freelance work

Hours will vary depending on workload, but there is strong potential for consistent work.

title: Senior Accountant (Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Are you a detail-driven accounting professional who thrives on turning complex financial data into accurate, reliable insights that real businesses depend on?



We need a Senior Accountant who acts as the financial backbone of our mission to “Help small businesses play a bigger game.” Reporting to the Accounting & Compliance Lead, you are a trusted steward of our numbers,  someone who uncovers financial risks before they surface, builds airtight records, and maintains the kind of precision and integrity that makes itGenius a firm our clients and team can always rely on.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you’re one too, apply now!





? Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here’s what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus 

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization 

Paid National/Local Holidays 



???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Job Overview:

The Senior Accountant ensures accurate financial reporting, revenue recognition, and compliance within IT Genius’s subscription-based model. This role manages core accounting processes, including A/R, A/P, payroll, and month-end close, while maintaining precision across all financial records and reconciliations.

 

Accountabilities

- General Ledger Integrity & AP Oversight: Accountable for the overall accuracy and integrity of the general ledger and the accounts payable function, ensuring all transactions are correctly recorded and reconciled in a timely manner.



- Tea
ntorship: Accountable for overseeing the work of the Junior Staff Accountant, providing guidance and support to ensure their accuracy and professional development.



- Specialist Team Enablement: Accountable for providing accurate and timely financial data and schedules to enable the Tax & Compliance and Financial Analyst roles to perform their functions effectively.

Closing of books within 7 working days.





Key Responsibilities:



- Revenue Recognition & Contract Accounting:

Manage revenue recognition processes in strict compliance with accounting standards.

Track deferred/unearned revenue and unbilled receivables from subscription billing cycles.

Accurately account for contract changes (upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, renewals) and their impact on revenue schedules.



- Operational Accounting:

Maintain the general ledger and prepare journal entries and reconciliations.

Oversee and reconcile A/P, A/R, and payroll processes.

Reconcile data from the Bill Management Platform (WHMCS) with the general ledger.



- Reporting & Compliance:

Prepare detailed financial reports by subscription tier, product, or segment.

Support timely and accurate preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements (IFRS compliant).

Ensure accurate invoicing for all subscription and usage-based fees, including setup and promotional discounts.



- Month-End Close:

Execute and review journal entries, reconciliations, and variance analyses.

Support Controller in ensuring a smooth and timely monthly close process.



- Audit & Documentation:

Prepare documentation and analysis for revenue and customer contract audits.

Support internal and external audit requirements as needed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Skills & Qualifications



Required:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

- Minimum of 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience (including FS preparation and GL review)

- Strong understanding of IFRS and revenue recognition principles

- Proficiency with accounting software (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite) and Google Sheets

- Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and organizational skills

- Excellent communication and time management abilities



It would be nice if you have:

- Experience working in a cloud technology, SaaS business, Web hosting, or reselling business

- Familiarity with subscription or recurring revenue models

- Hands-on experience with WHMCS or similar billing systems

- Knowledge of Google Workspace tools



Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift

- Philippine timezone, morning shift

- Monday to Friday

- Weekends off

- Observance of Philippine holiday

- Permanent Work Form Home



You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

- The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

- Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

- Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

As a Sales Consultant at itGenius, you'll be at the forefront of our mission to "Help small business play a bigger game," directly contributing to our vision of "facilitating happy, healthy, productive teams fuelling important global purpose-work." You embody the spirit of being the "Amazon Prime" of IT – highly responsive and providing solutions that are more convenient than Google or AI.

You'll operate like a member of a "high-performing sports team," demonstrating 10x thinking to achieve ambitious goals. As a "useful Geek," you'll leverage your love for technology to provide smart, human-centric solutions. This role is crucial in expanding our reach within the SMB market, acquiring new clients, and nurturing relationships that drive our growth towards becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services. You will be directly responsible for identifying opportunities, presenting our ingenious and seamless solutions, and ensuring our customers trust us to be an essential part of their success.





Core Accountabilities

The Sales Consultant will be held accountable for the following measurable objectives:

Individual Gross Profit Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed assigned quarterly and annual sales gross profit targets for new and existing clients

Sales Pipeline Health & Progression: Proactively manage and maintain a robust sales pipeline, ensuring a consistent flow of qualified leads and efficient progression of opportunities through all stages of the sales funnel.

Client Satisfaction & Smooth Onboarding: Ensure high levels of prospective client satisfaction throughout the sales process, culminating in a seamless and positive handover experience to the delivery and account management teams.





Key Responsibilities:

The day-to-day activities and duties of the Sales Consultant include:



Prospecting & Lead Qualification: Proactively identify, research, and qualify new sales opportunities within the small to medium business (SMB) market through various channels, including outbound prospecting, inbound lead follow-up, networking, and referrals.



Needs Assessment & Solution Design: Conduct in-depth needs assessments with prospective clients to thoroughly understand their business challenges, technology requirements, and strategic objectives.

Proposal Development & Negotiation: Prepare comprehensive and accurate sales proposals, quotes, and contracts. Lead negotiations to secure mutually beneficial agreements and close sales.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and detailed records of all sales activities, client interactions, pipeline status, and forecasts within the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system. Provide regular sales performance reports to the Head of Sales.



Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate closely with the technical, operations, and delivery teams to ensure proposed solutions are feasible, client expectations are managed effectively, and client onboarding is seamless.

Market & Product Knowledge: Continuously stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, emerging technologies, and itGenius's evolving product and service offerings to effectively position our solutions.



Post-Sales Handoff: Facilitate smooth and comprehensive handovers of new clients to the dedicated account management and service delivery teams, ensuring continuity and client satisfaction.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Experience: 2-3+ years B2B sales experience (ideally IT services or SaaS)

- Track record of meeting/exceeding GP targets

- Experience with CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Strong written and verbal communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace / cloud IT would be a plus





Skills:

- SMB market awareness

title: Marketing Project Manager (Growth Ops)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Mission: Helping Small Businesses Scale through Technology



At itGenius, we believe technology is the ultimate multiplier for growth. As a premier Google Workspace partner, we’ve spent 15 years helping over 5,000 business owners transition from startup chaos to scalable, efficient operations with Google Workspace and other cloud tools.



We are currently building a global, high-volume, systems-first consultancy. To achieve this, we need a Marketing Project Manager who views marketing as an engineering challenge—focusing on building the “pipes” that drive consistent, global growth.



The Role: Strategic Execution & Workflow Management

We prioritize data-driven execution over traditional marketing “fluff.”



Reporting directly to the Chief of Growth, your role is to bridge the gap between high-level strategy and tactical output. You won’t be managing a large internal team; instead, you will orchestrate a network of specialist contractors and automated systems to ensure our organic growth engine—primarily driven by our high-authority YouTube channel—is running at peak performance.



? Why Join Our High-Performance Team?

We offer a remote-first culture that values systems, clarity, and measurable results.



Work From Anywhere: Permanent work-from-home (aligned with Philippine Time).

Clear Career Growth: Budget for professional certifications and a defined path toward senior leadership.

Performance-Based Rewards: A monthly success bonus tied directly to the achievement of your KPIs.

Dynamic Culture: Annual team conferences (past locations include Boracay) and a focus on holistic well-being.

Comprehensive Benefits: Competitive compensation, health allowances, and tech support for your home office.





Core Responsibilities

You will oversee the marketing portfolio, ensuring every project is clearly defined, properly resourced, and delivered on schedule.



1. Content Strategy & Production Management: Direct our external editors and copywriters. Your task is to ensure all content aligns with our brand voice—the “Calm Expert Guide”—and effectively solves real-world business problems for our audience.

2. Growth Research & Competitive Analysis: Oversee our YouTube and search research process. You will identify high-demand topics and work with creatives to package them into high-performing titles and thumbnails.

3. Customer Lifecycle & Marketing Automation: Manage and optimize the customer journey within our CRM (Intercom). You will build and refine automated nurture sequences that guide prospects through our service tiers.

4. Technical SEO Coordination: Collaborate with our Engineering team to ensure our web properties remain healthy, crawlable, and optimized for the next generation of AI-driven search.

5. Performance Analytics: You will monitor and validate marketing KPIs bi-weekly, providing actionable insights during our Growth Sync meetings to improve ROI across all organic channels.





Who You Are (Fit & Mindset)

We look for candidates who demonstrate high ownership and a systems-first approach to problem-solving.



The “Systems Thinker”: You fundamentally understand B2B marketing funnels and how to manage complex workflows in a remote, international environment.

The “Tech-Savvy Professional”: You are comfortable navigating new tools, directing technical implementations, and taking absolute accountability for project outcomes.

The “Accountable Executor”: You are a power-user of project management tools (Asana preferred). You can write clear, “fail-proof” creative briefs and keep multiple contractors moving toward a single goal.





Required Qualifications

- 5+ Years in Marketing Operations or Project Management: Preferably within a B2B, SaaS, or tech consulting environment.

- Contractor Management: Proven experience sourcing, briefing, and holding external freelancers accountable for quality and deadlines.

- Tool Proficiency: Strong experience with Asana (or similar), CRM automation platforms, and an understanding of YouTube/Search analytics.

- Communication Excellence: You bring solutions, not just problems, and communicate with clarity and professionalism.





Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift, Philippine Time but flexible as some team are based in Europe.

- Monday to Friday (Weekends off).





Are You Ready to Scale with Us?

If you’re ready to build a scalable marketing machine that delivers tangible business impact, we’d love to meet you.



Apply Now and tell us: Which specific marketing system or workflow have you built that you are most proud of?

- Annual Salary Increases
