title: WordPress & LearnDash Content Assistant
description:
I run an online education platform built on WordPress and am looking for a detail-oriented assistant to help upload and manage quiz content, maintain the site, and make page edits.



This role involves working with structured content (Word documents and Excel spreadsheets) and ensuring accuracy when importing quizzes into the platform. It is not a creative role — it is accuracy-focused. You will be working with large volumes of structured educational content, so precision and consistency are essential.

Key Responsibilities:



Import quizzes into LearnDash from Excel/XLSX files

Compare uploaded questions against original Word documents to ensure accuracy

Fix formatting issues (text, images, equations, HTML)

Insert and align images correctly within quizzes

Apply quiz categories and tags correctly

Identify and fix errors (missing answers, incorrect formatting, broken layouts)

Make page edits and updates in Elementor (text changes, layout adjustments, creating new pages from templates)

Make small updates in the WordPress admin where required



Requirements:



Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

Comfortable working with Excel/Google Sheets

Experience with WordPress admin (not just front-end — you need to be comfortable navigating the backend)

Experience with Elementor page builder (creating and editing pages, not just minor text swaps)

Able to follow structured instructions carefully

Good English reading comprehension (the content is aimed at Australian students aged 11–14)

Reliable internet and availability for at least 2–3 hours per day



Nice to Have (not required):



Experience with LearnDash or any WordPress LMS plugin

Experience with FluentCRM or other WordPress
/CRM plugins

Basic HTML understanding (line breaks, image alignment, formatting)

Any familiarity with landing page structure or conversion-focused page design



Important: This role is not about being creative — it is accuracy-focused. You will be working with large volumes of structured content, so precision and consistency are essential.



Trial Task: Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid task involving reviewing a quiz import, fixing formatting issues, and comparing against a source document.



Please include in your application:



Your experience with Excel or data entry work

Any experience with WordPress / LearnDash / Elementor

Why you think you are a good fit for a detail-focused role

Confirm you have read this listing and are comfortable with the $5 USD/hour rate

title: YouTube Researcher
description:
Research & Content Curator – Trend & Evergreen Video Specialist



About the Role:



We are seeking a highly analytical and creatively driven Researcher to join our team and spearhead a crucial initiative: identifying and cultivating profitable, trending, and enduring video niches on YouTube. 



This role isn’t just about finding popular content – it’s about understanding why these niches resonate with audiences and building a strategy to ensure long-term success. 



You’ll be the driving force behind discovering and validating promising video ideas, and ultimately, contributing to a steady stream of engaging content. You’ll be a strategic thinker, deeply familiar with YouTube analytics, and possess a keen eye for emerging trends.



Responsibilities:



Trend Identification: Research and analyze YouTube trends across various niches – identifying emerging topics, popular sounds, formats, and underserved areas. 



This includes leveraging YouTube Trends, Google Trends, and dedicated trend tracking tools.



Niche Validation: Rigorously assess the viability of potential niches using YouTube analytics, audience engagement data, and creator assessment. Validate these ideas with demonstrable audience interest and monetization potential.



Channel Analysis & Evaluation: Deep dive into 5-10 established YouTube channels that exemplify the successful combination of trending content, evergreen appeal, and good audience engagement. This includes understanding their content strategy, video formats, audience demographics, and content quality.



Data Analysis & Reporting: Compile, analyze, and present data-driven insights into identified niches – highlighting key metrics, potential for growth, and risk assessment. Develop regular reports with actionable recommendations.



Content Idea Generation: Proactively brainstorm and develop creative video concepts based on the research – focusing on evergreen formats (tutorials, lists, reviews, how-tos, etc.) that can maintain audience interest over time.



Community Engagement: Monitor social media, forums, and other online communities related to identified niches to understand audience sentiment, pain points, and emerging conversations.



YouTube Analytics Mastery: Become a proficient YouTube Analytics user – understanding key metrics (watch time, completion rates, audience retention, engagement), channel optimization, and audience behavior.



Collaboration: Work closely with content strategists and creative teams to integrate researched insights into actual video production.



Required Skills & Experience:



Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

Minimum 2-3 years of experience in market research, data analysis, or content analysis (preferably within the digital space).

Exceptional YouTube analytics proficiency (YouTube Studio, TubeBuddy, VidIQ – be familiar with at least one).

Strong analytical skills, ability to interpret data, and draw insightful conclusions.

Creative thinking and the ability to generate innovative video ideas.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

A strong understanding of YouTube SEO and algorithm principles.



If you have read this far you have great attention to detail - I won't reply to any applications unless you have the words YT Researcher in the subject line.



This has the potential to be long term work for the right person.

title: Finance Officer (Accounts Payable, Receivable, Procurement)
description:
Full-time- 40hrs/week

AU Business Hours (8:30 AM – 5:00 PM AEST)

$350/week



We are looking for a detail-oriented Finance Officer to join our growing international team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, improving processes, and managing financial operations in a structured environment. 



You will be responsible for supporting the finance team by managing accounts payable, accounts receivable, and procurement processes, ensuring invoices, payments, and financial records are handled accurately and on time.



This is a remote role working with an established international company with a collaborative and professional culture.



What You'll Do:



Accounts Payable

- Review and process supplier invoices

- Manage weekly payment runs

- Reconcile supplier invoices and statements

- Ensure invoices are coded correctly and approved

- Maintain organized invoice records

- Support month-end financial processes

- Coordinate with internal teams and external vendors





Procurement Support

- Raise purchase orders

- Assist in supplier sourcing and RFP preparation

- Maintain supplier databases

- Support supplier evaluation and onboarding





Accounts Receivable

- Process and allocate customer payments

- Reconcile payments with banking and accounting systems

- Maintain customer debtor accounts

- Assist with resolving payment discrepancies







What We're Looking For:



Required Skills & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business

- Proven experience in Accounts Payable

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and bookkeeping

- Experience handling high-volume invoices

- Strong Excel skills

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment





Highly Preferred

- Experience using SAP or similar ERP systems

- Experience with financial reconciliation

- Experience supporting procurement processes

- Experience working with international finance teams



Key Traits for Success

We are looking for someone who is:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Organized and able to meet deadlines

- A strong communicator with internal and external stakeholders

- Comfortable handling large volumes of financial data

- Proactive in improving processes





Why Join Us?

- Stable long-term remote opportunity

- Work with an experienced global finance team

- Structured processes and supportive leadership

- Opportunity to grow within an international company



To Apply:

- Share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. How many years of Accounts Payable, Receivable and procurement experience do you have?

2. Which accounting or ERP systems have you used?

3. You receive a supplier invoice for $5,200, but the Purchase Order is $5,000 and the goods receipt shows $5,000.

What steps would you take before approving the invoice for payment?

4. A supplier statement shows 5 outstanding invoices, but your accounting system only shows 3 invoices recorded.

What would you do to reconcile this?

5. Why is it important to reconcile Accounts Payable before month-end closing, and what problems can happen if this is not done?

title: Business Development & Cold Outreach Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote

Preferred Working Hours: US Central or Pacific Time Zone



Role Summary

We are seeking a high-energy, results-oriented Sales Professional to lead our B2B business development efforts. Your primary mission is to identify, hunt, and convert hospitality business owners into registered active clients on our B2B platform.

This is a pure sales role. While we value digital marketing skills, your success will be measured solely by your ability to hit aggressive registration and first-order KPIs through relentless cold outreach.



Key Responsibilities: 

Business Development & Registration Outreach (Primary KPI)

  -Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to identify and research prospective hospitality businesses, including vacation rental owners, independent hotel owners, and boutique property operators, as target clients for our B2B website.

  -Conduct targeted outreach via cold
 and platforms such as vacation rental platforms and LinkedIn to engage qualified prospects and introduce our B2B website.

  -Use AI-assisted tools to write personalized, high-converting outreach copy and follow-up sequences tailored to each prospect’s business type.

  -Offer deep discount coupons or cash incentives to convert interested prospects into registered businesses on the platform.

  -Guide prospects through the full registration process: assist with W-9 form submission and successful Business Account creation on our B2B website.

  -Follow up with registered businesses to ensure they successfully place their first order, completing the full conversion cycle.

  -Track and report weekly registration and order conversion numbers. A minimum of 30 confirmed new business registrations must be achieved within the first month post-training.



Compensation:

  Base pay: $700/monthly negotiable with promotion opportunity after 3 month based on performance

  Performance bonus: $15 per confirmed new business registration/order placed through our B2B website 



Business Development & KPI

  -Primary KPI: Drive new business registrations on our B2B website by recruiting hospitality businesses and independent property owners via platforms including but not limited to LinkedIn, Airbnb, and other vacation rental platforms

  -Target prospects include vacation rental owners, boutique hotel owners, independent hospitality operators, and other small-to-mid-sized hospitality businesses.

  -Leverage deep discount offers and cash incentives as conversion tools to encourage prospects to complete their first order on the platform.

  -Track and report registration conversion metrics on a weekly basis.



Qualifications:

Required:

  -Strong written and verbal English skills, with the ability to write clear and persuasive outreach messages

  -Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT. Candidates must be comfortable using AI for prospect research, copywriting, and outreach personalization. This is a requirement, not a nice-to-have.

  -Experience with cold outreach, B2B lead generation, or direct sales

  -Self-starter, goal-driven, and able to work independently in a fully remote environment

  -Proficiency in Google Sheets and general data organization

  -Availability to work within US Central or Pacific Standard Time hours (Monday to Friday, 8:00 PM – 4:00 AM PHT

title: Full-Time Graphic Designer – Fashion & Streetwear Brands
description:
Full-Time Graphic Designer – Fashion & Streetwear Brands

title: YouTube Scriptwriter
description:
YouTube Scriptwriter



Overview



We run a fast-growing media operation producing documentary-style videos for faceless YouTube channels.



We're hiring a full-time Scriptwriter who is proficient to help turn our briefs into polished YouTube scripts at

scale. 



You'll be highly coachable, follow SOPs closely, and iterate based on feedback. 



Training, templates, and prompt frameworks are provided.



What You'll Do (Daily Responsibilities)

• Follow our step-by-step SOPs for hooks, structure, storytelling, and retention tactics.

• Fact-check basic claims, ensure originality (no plagiarism), and format scripts to our template.

• Communicate progress, flag blockers early, and submit scripts on rolling deadlines throughout the day.

• Maintain tidy documentation (Google Docs/Trello) and track deliverables against daily targets.

• Implement feedback rapidly to improve speed and quality over time.



Requirements (Must-Have)

• Experience writing for YouTube, especially faceless/automation-style channels.

• Strong written English: clear, concise, on-brand, and engaging.

• Coachable & trainable: you enjoy following SOPs, learning fast, and improving with feedback.

• Detail-oriented with strong adherence to deadlines and quality standards.

• Reliable internet and availability for full-time, high-volume work.



Nice to Have (Bonus Points)

• Familiarity with retention-focused scripting (strong hooks, open loops, narrative beats).

• Light research ability and comfort fact-checking.

• Basic familiarity with Google Docs, Notion, and simple checklists.



Workload

• Long-term, steady work for the right person.



• Flexible work hours (we operate 7 days but primarily focus on weekdays; exact schedule

flexible as long as deadlines are met).



Quality Bar (What "Great" Looks Like)

• Snappy, curiosity-driven hooks within the first few lines.

• Clear structure (setup ? tension ? insights ? payoff), smooth transitions, minimal fluff.

• Audience-friendly tone; reads well out loud; avoids jargon.

• Accurate, original content formatted to our template.



If you have read this far and have the right attention to deal you will reply with YT Scriptwriter in the subject field.

title: [CEBU BASED] AMAZON ACCOUNT/CATALOG MANAGER
description:
{MUST READ UNTIL THE END!}



Quick Highlights

- Role: Join a profitable, fast-growing e-commerce brand and own the account management that protects our Amazon revenue. You'll be the systematic guardian of our marketplace performance, building AI-powered processes that turn every customer interaction into a growth opportunity.

- Stage: Profitable, 12-year-old e-commerce business with $5M+ annual revenue across 4 Amazon marketplaces (US, UK, DE, IRL), experiencing consistent 30% YoY growth

- Team: Join our lean team of 6 A-Players, where your work directly impacts company performance

- Reports to: Amazon Operations Manager

- Schedule: Full-time. Needs overlap with US business hours for optimal support + weekend coverage. Beyond that, you have FLEXIBLE time.

- Location: Hybrid in CEBU, PHILIPPINES (core hours in-office required, remaining hours flexible)

- Compensation: Competitive + benefits (including paid federal holidays off)

- Why now: We've maintained 30% YoY growth for several years through systematic execution. We need a disciplined operator who can keep a close eye on the details, build bullet-proof systems, and ensure nothing slips through the cracks as we scale further.



About the Role

You'll be responsible for owning our Amazon catalog integrity and account health across 4 marketplaces. This means flat files, variation management, suppressed ASIN troubleshooting, and Seller Support case resolution—all while building the processes and systems that enable sustainable growth.

If flat files excite you and you get satisfaction from solving listing puzzles that others give up on, keep reading.





You’d Be a Fit If You…

- Catalog Management Experience: 2+ years hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience with exposure to flat files, variation structures, and listing troubleshooting — you don't need to be an expert, but you need to know your way around

- Seller Support Familiarity: You've opened cases, navigated Amazon's systems, and understand how to document and follow through until resolved

- Systems Minded: You naturally document what you do and look for ways to make processes repeatable

- AI Curious: You've used AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.) to improve your work, and you're eager to learn more

- Detail Obsessed: You catch errors others miss and take pride in accuracy

- Self-Sufficient: You can work independently, figure things out, and ask smart questions when stuck

- Results Focused: Track record of achieving specific, measurable outcomes rather than just completing tasks





Not a fit if…

- You're primarily focused on PPC, creative, or brand strategy

- You need constant supervision or step-by-step guidance

- You dislike process, repetition, or detailed data tasks

- You're agency-based or juggling multiple clients

- Flat files make you nervous





Looking for the following traits

- Systematic Thinking: You naturally build structure where none exists

- Ownership Mentality: Complete accountability for outcomes without excuses or drama

- Resourcefulness: You check docs first, ask questions second, and solve problems independently

- AI Innovation: You actively seek ways to leverage AI tools and create custom solutions that improve efficiency

- Zero-Error Mindset: You catch your own mistakes before anyone else does

- Good Judgment: Make smart decisions without micromanagement or hand-holding

- Hustle & Initiative: Proactively identify improvements and make things smoother/faster/organized





Responsibilities

- Catalog & Listing Ownership – maintain zero discrepancies across all 4 marketplaces; own flat file uploads, variation structures, and listing accuracy

- Account Health Guardian – catch ? 90% of account-health threats before they impact sales or ranking

- Seller Support Mastery – resolve cases with persistence, documentation, and follow-through until closed

- AI Innovation & Process Optimization – launch at least one GPT/AI solution per quarter that measurably boosts efficiency or outcomes

- SOPs & Documentation – continuously optimize processes based on performance data and AI capabilities

- Data Hygiene & Dashboards – keep metrics 100% accurate and deliver a scorecard the team trusts

- Administrative Excellence – execute daily tasks with zero unforced errors or need for micromanagement

- Attention to detail is critical for this role—we're looking for someone who actually reads job descriptions carefully, so when we ask what your favorite number is, the answer is 99.



Why join us

- Autonomy: Full control over your domain with minimal management

- Growth: Be part of scaling a profitable business with clear room for career advancement and salary growth

- Learning: Work directly with experienced e-commerce operators and learn advanced strategies

- Systems Building: Opportunity to build processes from the ground up and see immediate impact

- Culture: Low-drama. High-clarity. Feedback-friendly. We protect work-life balance with flexible schedules and time for what matters—yourself and your family.





Interview Process

- Apply for the role here ? 

- Initial conversation with Head of Growth Marketing & Amazon Operations Manager

- Deep dive into Amazon experience and systematic thinking examples

- Process building exercise to evaluate systematic approach

- Final round with leadership team and culture fit assessment

title: Creative Growth Operator — Social Media, Content Strategy & Video Editing
description:
We are hiring a full-time Creative Growth Operator to help grow a founder-led personal brand in the business/consulting space.

The goal is simple:

Research what's working. Create content that stops the scroll. Grow the audience. Turn that audience into inbound leads.

This role covers the full content operation — from concept to publish. If you only edit videos and wait to be told what to make, this is not for you.

You need to think like a growth operator and execute like a content team of one.



What You'll Own End to End

Strategy & Research



Research viral content formats and trending videos in the business/consulting space each week

Adapt trending formats for our specific audience (service business owners — tradies, mortgage brokers, physios, real estate agents)

Pitch 2–3 content ideas per week unprompted — come with a "you have to do this one" attitude

Identify what's performing on the account and double down on it

Track weekly performance (views, reach, engagement, follower growth) and report findings



Content Production



Script talking head reels, B-roll style videos, and carousels

Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts — tight pacing, captions, hooks

Repurpose long-form YouTube videos into multiple short clips

Design and produce carousel posts from scratch

Create engaging thumbnails for YouTube



Social Media Execution



Upload and schedule all content across Instagram and YouTube

Write captions in the founder's voice

Manage YouTube uploads (titles, descriptions, tags)

Post daily Instagram Stories — polls, lead magnet pushes, behind the scenes

Start DMs and reply to comments to drive engagement



Paid Ads (Ideal but not essential)



Assist with Meta ad creative — cut and prepare video/image assets to spec

Help write ad copy using a structured template

Flag when creatives are fatiguing and suggest replacements





Who This Is For



You understand hooks, retention, and what makes someone stop scrolling

You actively study creators and trends — you know what's going viral before being told

You can take an idea from concept to published post without hand-holding

You're fast. You finish things. You don't need chasing.

You have strong English — written and spoken

You want long-term work and will grow with the role

Experience with Meta Ads is a bonus — not required





Application Instructions

To apply, answer all of the following:



Send 2–3 examples of short-form content you've produced — ideally where you were involved in the concept, not just the edit

Find a video that's currently going viral in the business or personal brand space. Tell us why it's working and how you'd recreate it for an Australian business consultant

What makes someone stop scrolling in the first 2 seconds? Give us your answer, not a generic one

Have you worked with an Australian-based client or business before? (If not, that's ok)

Have you ever managed a social media account end to end — not just edited the videos?

What tools do you use for video editing, scheduling, and content research?

How would you grow a personal brand Instagram account from 20K to 100K followers in 12 months? Give us your actual thinking.

title: Reddit Marketing & Community Growth Specialist (Organic Strategy – Remote)

title: Business Development Representative
description:

The candidate will have an opportunity to make an immediate impact on day one by learning our systems and processes and customizing them for their own success. Our organization places particular emphasis on preserving our culture of collaboration therefore, the ideal candidate is one that thrives in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment where every tea
mber has an equal opportunity to contribute to our success.

mbers

Exceptional communication skills

Inside sales experience

Lead generation

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and collaborate with cross-functional teams



Preferred Experience

* Experience supporting executive leadership

* Exposure to M&A analysis and strategic investment modeling

* Experience working with professional services firms or multi-practice organizations



If you're interested in applying, please send your application along with the requirements listed below:



Resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences. Thanks!

title: Part-Time Accountant / Bookkeeper – Singapore
description:
Company: Trimly by Astro Health Clinic

Website: trimly.sg





Location: Fully Remote (Singapore-based operations)

Hours: 10-20 hours/week, flexible schedule. Work from home (Philippines-based).

Compensation: USD $5-6/hour, depending on experience. Room to grow as the business scales.





About Us

Trimly is a Singapore-registered telehealth clinic specializing in weight management. We're a small, fast-moving team looking for a reliable part-time accountant / bookkeeper to take ownership of our accounting operations and regulatory compliance filings. We use Xero as our accounting platform.



What You'll Do



Day-to-day accounting:

Manage accounts payable, accounts receivable, bank reconciliations, and expense categorization in Xero

Perform monthly closing of books and maintain a clean, audit-ready general ledger



Financial reporting:

Prepare unaudited financial statements (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) in compliance with Singapore Financial Reporting Standards (SFRS)

Generate monthly management reports for the founder



Tax & regulatory compliance:

Prepare and file quarterly GST returns with IRAS (Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore)

Prepare Estimated Chargeable Income (ECI) and annual Form C-S / Form C-S (Lite) filings

Maintain accurate records and supporting schedules for tax computations and potential IRAS queries



What We're Looking For

- Degree or diploma in Accounting, Finance, or related field

- At least 2 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience

- Proficiency in Xero (certified or significant hands-on experience)

- Experience preparing financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Strong English communication (written and verbal)

- Detail-oriented, reliable, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



Strong preference for:

- Experience with Singapore corporate tax (IRAS), GST compliance, or ACRA filings

- Familiarity with Singapore Financial Reporting Standards (SFRS)

- CPA or Certified Bookkeeper qualification

- Experience working with international (non-Philippine) clients



Nice to have — we're willing to train the right person:



If you have solid accounting fundamentals and Xero proficiency but haven't worked with Singapore compliance before, we're open to training you. Singapore tax and GST processes are well-documented and learnable — what matters most is that you're sharp, organized, and proactive.



How to Apply



Please include in your application:

- A brief summary of your accounting experience, especially any international (non-Philippine) work

- Which accounting software you're most experienced with and for how long

- Whether you have any experience with Singapore IRAS, GST, or ACRA (if yes, please describe)

- Your expected monthly rate (USD)

- Your available hours per week and preferred working schedule

- Please submit a 1-minute video introduction, explaining why you are ideal for this specific role. Include the word 'pineapple' in your response to show you read this post.

title: Video Editor
description:
Job Title: Video Editor (DTC Skincare) – Work Directly with Founder.

RINEN. is a Singapore-based DTC skincare brand looking for a creative, fast-paced, and independent Video Editor to help us scale our social media presence. You will work directly with our founder, Vanessa, to turn raw footage into high-converting, viral-style content for TikTok and Instagram.



The Role & Workflow

Assets: We provide A-roll, B-roll, scripts, and voiceovers via Google Drive.



Your Task: Filter the best assets, stitch them together, add captions, and create engaging 1–3 minute videos optimized for Instagram and TikTok.



Tools: You must be proficient in CapCut.



Speed: We move fast. First drafts are expected within 24 hours of receiving assets.



Volume: 5 videos per week.



Requirements

Experience: At least 2 years of professional video editing experience.



Social Media Savvy: You have a "gut feel" for what makes a video go viral (pacing, hooks, captions).



Independence: Since this is a remote role, you must be a self-starter who can manage your own time and hit deadlines without being chased.



Communication: High level of English proficiency to work closely with the founder.



Benefits & Perks

Generous Time Off: 14 days of paid leave + unlimited unpaid time off.



Financial Growth: End-of-year performance bonus.



Career Path: This isn't just a gig—we are looking for someone to grow into a Head Video Editor position.



Mentorship: Learn the ins and outs of the DTC skincare industry directly from the founder.



[IMPORTANT] We will only review applications from candidates who apply with 10 Apply Points (AP).



Please include:



A link to your portfolio or previous work (specifically CapCut/Short-form content).



A brief intro on why you’re the best fit for our skincare brand.

You'll leverage Java and the open-source libGDX framework to design, develop, and deploy high-performance games across desktop, Android, and web platforms, contributing to every stage of the game development lifecycle.

title: Household Cleaning including Video Data Collection
description:
**Video Data Collector – Household Cleaning Tasks (Wearable Camera)**



Get paid to clean your own home. We're collecting first-person video to help train AI and robotics systems, and we need people willing to perform everyday household tasks while wearing a smartphone mounted on their head. You work from home, on your own schedule. All you need is a phone and a clean (or messy!) house.





**What You'll Do**



Wear a head-mounted smartphone and go about normal household cleaning tasks while the camera records your first-person perspective. Most contributors record in 20 to 60 minute sessions. Tasks include:



- **Room Tidying & Organization** - Pick up clutter, rearrange items on shelves and tables, straighten furniture, and restore a messy room to order

- **Dishwashing (Full Cycle)** - Gather dirty dishes, wash or load them, dry, and put them away

- **Laundry (Full Cycle)** - Collect clothes, wash, dry, fold, and put them away

- **General Household Chores** - Sweeping, mopping, wiping surfaces, taking out trash, watering plants, or any routine task that involves using your hands



The more variety in your recordings (different rooms, objects, layouts), the more valuable the data, so we encourage you to mix things up.





**Equipment & Setup**



*Camera:* A smartphone (or equivalent camera) that records at 1080p and 30 FPS or better. Most phones made in the last 5 years qualify.



*Orientation:* Smartphone must be in landscape (horizontal) mode. Alternative cameras should have a wide field of view (approximately 130 degrees or wider).



*Mounting:* The phone must be securely strapped to your forehead or at eye level, angled slightly downward so your hands and the objects you're working with stay visible. Inexpensive head-strap mounts work great. We can help you find one and cover the cost.



*Environment:* Your own home or any real residential space. Good, even lighting is required. Natural daylight or well-lit rooms work best.





**Quality Standards**



Every recording goes through quality review. Only footage that meets these standards will be accepted:



*Accepted footage:*

- Hands clearly visible for the majority of the recording, with both palms and fingers showing while you handle objects

- Tasks performed naturally and purposefully, the way you'd actually clean your home

- Steady, well-lit, free of obstructions (no fingers over the lens, no extreme tilt)

- Each clip at least 15 seconds long

- Recorded with your full attention. No multitasking or operating other devices during a session.



*What gets rejected:*

- Shaky, blurry, or poorly lit video

- Hands rarely visible or only partially in frame

- Artificially slow, robotic, or exaggerated movements

- Long pauses or idle time with no meaningful activity

- Repetitive recordings of the same task in the same setting

- Corrupted or incomplete files



You'll receive feedback if a recording isn't accepted so you can improve on future sessions.





**Who Should Apply**



- No degree or technical background required

- Must be at least 18 years old

- Access to a home or residential space where you can record

- A smartphone that records at 1080p / 30 FPS (most modern phones do)

- Comfortable being recorded from a first-person perspective. Your face will not appear on camera.

- Can commit to at least 4 to 8 hours of recording per week

- Reliable internet connection for uploading video files





**How to Apply**



*Step 1:* Send us a brief message with your name, city, phone model, and weekly availability.



*Step 2:* If shortlisted, we'll ask you to record a short 2-minute sample video of any household cleaning task using a head-mounted phone. Most people who submit a sample hear back within a few days.





**About the Data**



The video you record is used to train AI and robotics systems to understand how people interact with everyday objects and environments. Your recordings are handled confidentially and used solely for research and development purposes. Your face does not appear in the footage.

title: Remote F&B Cost Controller
description:
FOOD & BEVERAGE COST CONTROLLER

Location:  (Remote)

Reports To: Director of Finance / General Manager

Employment Type: Full-time

Industry: Hospitality / Food & Beverage



POSITION OVERVIEW

We are seeking an experienced Food & Beverage Cost Controller with a strong hospitality background to manage all aspects of F&B cost analysis, vendor sourcing, inventory control, and financial reporting. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in food and beverage operations, preferably from a quality hotel or resort environment such as Hyatt, Raffles, or similar luxury hospitality brands.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Accounts Payable & Invoice Management



Enter and process all food and beverage invoices with accuracy and timeliness

Maintain organized records of all vendor transactions and payment schedules

Reconcile invoices against purchase orders and delivery receipts



Vendor Management & Strategic Sourcing



Research and identify competitive pricing by soliciting quotes from all approved vendors via

Source quality produce from US, Philippines, and other international markets

Negotiate pricing and terms with suppliers to optimize cost savings

Evaluate new vendor opportunities and maintain strong supplier relationships

Monitor market trends and recommend sourcing alternatives



Recipe Costing & Menu Analysis



Manage and maintain recipe costs in Accounting & Micros POS system

Update ingredient costs regularly based on current vendor pricing

Calculate and analyze menu item profitability

Provide recommendations for menu pricing adjustments based on cost analysis



Cost Analysis & Reporting



Produce monthly theoretical versus actual cost comparison reports for food and beverage

Identify and investigate variances between theoretical and actual costs

Analyze food and beverage cost percentages and prepare detailed variance reports

Generate actionable insights to reduce waste and improve profitability



Liquor Inventory & Control



Collaborate on liquor inventory management and control procedures

Analyze weekly bottle weighing data provided by local team

Prepare monthly liquor cost analysis and variance reports

Identify discrepancies and recommend corrective actions for inventory shrinkage



General



Support the finance team with ad hoc cost analysis and special projects

Ensure compliance with all accounting policies and procedures

Maintain confidentiality of all financial and proprietary information





QUALIFICATIONS & REQUIREMENTS

Required:



Education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Hospitality Management, or Culinary Arts

Experience: Minimum 3-5 years in food and beverage cost control, preferably in a hotel or resort setting

Industry Background: Experience with quality hospitality organizations (Hyatt, Raffles, Marriott, Four Seasons, or equivalent luxury brands strongly preferred)

Technical Skills:



Proficiency in Micros POS system (recipe costing module)

Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas)

Strong accounting and bookkeeping knowledge

Experience with accounts payable systems







Highly Preferred:



Former chef or culinary professional with transition to cost control

Certified Public Accountant (CPA) or pursuing CPA certification

Experience in multi-unit food and beverage operations

Knowledge of international food sourcing and import/export processes



Skills & Competencies:



Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

Superior written and verbal communication skills in English

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

Proactive mindset with ability to identify cost-saving opportunities

Strong organizational and time management skills

Proficiency in vendor negotiation and relationship management

Understanding of food and beverage operations, purchasing, and inventory management





WHAT WE OFFER



Competitive salary commensurate with experience

Remote work flexibility

Opportunity to work with an established hospitality operation

Professional growth and development opportunities

Collaborative team environment

title: Heavyweight Video Editor
description:
Function: Video Editing | Post-Production | Motion Graphics | Performance Creative

Responsibility: Deliver high-impact video content for fast-growth D2C brands

Reports to: Head of Paid Social & Creative

Location: Remote — Philippines (Working UK Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT/BST)



Overview

Vendo is a performance-driven creative and media agency partnering with some of the most exciting D2C and e-commerce brands in the UK and beyond. Our team blends creative strategy, production, design and data-backed optimisation to produce ads that don’t just look great — they scale.

From UGC and high-production video to motion graphics and conversion-led design, we act as the in-house creative engine for ambitious brands. Our work sits at the intersection of insight, psychology and performance — delivering creative that moves the needle.

As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a Heavyweight Video Editor based in Philippines who can take a brief and run with it — someone who edits with pace, precision and a deep understanding of what makes people stop scrolling. You’ll work remotely as an embedded member of our UK-based creative team, operating on UK hours (9:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT/BST).



The Role

You’ll be the go-to editor within Vendo’s creative team, responsible for turning raw footage, UGC content and creative concepts into polished, high-performing video assets across Meta, TikTok and beyond. Your work will directly impact campaign performance for some of the fastest-growing brands in the UK.

You’ll collaborate closely with our creative strategists, designers, media buyers and production teams — bringing ideas to life through sharp editing, compelling pacing and platform-native storytelling.

This role is ideal for someone who lives and breathes video, understands the nuances of performance creative, and wants to push the quality bar in a commercially minded, supportive team. You’ll need to be comfortable working UK hours to ensure seamless collaboration with the wider team.



What You’ll Own

Edit and deliver high-quality video content across UGC, high-production shoots, testimonials, product demos and branded content

Cut performance-driven ad creatives optimised for Meta, TikTok, YouTube Shorts and other paid social platforms

Apply motion graphics, text overlays, transitions and sound design to elevate creative output

Collaborate with creative strategists to interpret briefs and translate concepts into compelling video

Manage colour grading, audio mixing and final quality checks to ensure every asset is delivery-ready

Repurpose and adapt content across multiple formats, aspect ratios and platform specifications

Build and maintain an organised asset library and project file structure

Stay ahead of editing trends, platform best practices and emerging video formats

Manage multiple projects simultaneously with speed, structure and attention to detail



What Success Looks Like (First 3 - 6 Months)

You confidently own the end-to-end editing process across multiple client accounts

Turnaround times are fast without compromising quality

Creative strategists and media buyers trust your output and actively want to collaborate

Video performance metrics improve as your edits are tested and iterated

You’ve established efficient workflows and a reputation for reliability and craft

You’re fully integrated with the UK team despite working remotely



You’ll Thrive Here If You Have

3–5+ years of professional video editing experience, ideally within an agency, production house or performance marketing environment

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro or CapCut experience is a bonus)

Strong motion graphics and animation skills for lower thirds, text overlays and dynamic transitions

A sharp eye for pacing, storytelling and what makes content perform on paid social

Experience editing UGC, testimonial-style and direct-response video content

Solid understanding of platform specs, aspect ratios and delivery requirements across Meta, TikTok and YouTube

Strong colour grading and audio editing fundamentals

Meticulous attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines

Reliable internet connection and a professional remote setup suitable for video editing

A proactive, commercially minded, growth-oriented mindset



Who You Are (Mindset & Attitude)

You take ownership — of wins, challenges and outcomes

You think commercially and always look for ways to drive value through your craft

You communicate clearly, confidently and with empathy

You’re solution-focused and motivated by continuous improvement

You enjoy collaborating in a high-performance, fast-paced environment — even remotely

You’re ambitious — for yourself, your clients and your work

title: BIM Architectural Modeler (On-Site)
description:
BIM Architectural Modeler Role



Update and maintain architectural BIM models for design and as-built conditions.

Produce and revise shop drawings, wall setting-out, tile setting layouts, and architectural details.

Coordinate with architects, engineers, and contractors to resolve clashes and incorporate design changes.

Requirements: Proficient in Revit/BIM tools, 2+ years BIM modeling experience, strong understanding of architectural construction and setting-out practices.



Update architectural and structural BIM models; produce shop drawings, wall/tile setting-out, concrete body plans, and other construction deliverables.

Coordinate multidisciplinary inputs, perform clash detection, and ensure models reflect as-built/site conditions.

Requirements: 2+ years BIM experience, proficient in Revit and Civil 3D (or equivalents), practical knowledge of architectural and structural setting-out and shop drawing production.

title: Email Campaign Manager
description:
ABOUT GENFLOW

We are the world’s leading creator monetisation agency. We do everything from building brands with creators, launch digital platforms and work with the world's biggest brands. Our creators include Iman Gadzhi, Grace Beverley, Mike Thurston, Leana Deeb, Chris Williamson and many others. 



We believe having an audience is the most powerful asset you can have - it represents a ready made customer base to which anyone can sell the right product(s), and on which you can launch and scale a business fast. We’ve had a lot of success with this model, and manage a portfolio of 65+ creator brands across physical and digital products in fitness, fashion, beauty, nutrition and wellness, education and productivity. 



We are a fast-growing, ambitious company (team is a 100+ with global offices) that has achieved so much already, but knows there is still so much more opportunity to go after, which is why we are building out our high-performing team. 



Learn about Genflow > 

See our socials here > 
 



THE ROLE



The
 campaign manager will be responsible for managing and optimising our customer marketing channels across a portfolio of 10-15 different creator brands, with a combined customer list volume of several million.
 is a very important channel for us and which offers plenty more opportunities for growth and sales, so we are looking for a full stack
 marketer to join us to unleash a new wave of growth through this channel. 



For us,
 marketing goes beyond just sending ad hoc newsletters out to our lists. It’s about impacting user behaviour and purchase decisions through timely marketing interventions. It’s about attracting new customers into our marketing funnels with lead magnets and it’s about driving sales. You will work closely with the wider Growth, Marketing and Commercial teams.



Key Responsibilities:



- Own our
 campaign strategy end to end.

- Co-ordinating with designers and copywriters to deliver a combination of plain text and banner
s in accordance with brand guidelines

- Design and implement marketing campaigns that achieve best-in-class open and click through rates and drive sales

- Optimise campaigns based on performance

- Implement new popups on web to increase total list size

- Design the right frameworks for testing eg. different subject lines, preview text structures, CTAs etc to develop our insight into what works best for each brand

- Take responsibility for devising the
 marketing strategy and its execution and reporting of results.

- Pull and interrogate the relevant data points that will inform strategy, and harness the insight to put in place practical action plans to improve performance

- Report results weekly to line managers internally 





Ideal Skills + Experience:

- Proven experience in a specialist
 marketing role within the B2C digital content and / or e-commerce industries, preferably with experience in some of the following categories: fitness content platforms, courses and paid community platforms.

- Deep knowledge of designing, implementing, and optimising campaigns

- Analytical thinker and problem-solver with a deep understanding of the metrics and data, and A/B testing, and the ability to translate data into insight and action plans

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Strong copywriting pedigree, especially sales and conversion focussed copy

- Ability to create assets using eg Canva to support
s

- Strong organisational skills and attention to detail.



The kind of attitude we’re looking for:

- A naturally curious problem solver 

- The ability to work across multiple projects at the same time at pace

- Someone who really takes pride in their work and the quality of their output 

- A genuine willingness to roll up their sleeves and get work done and make things happen, whether it’s reporting, analysis, execution or jumping on a call with a client 

- A willingness to learn, improve and refine their craft

- Someone who’s naturally interested in creators, social commerce and social content 



Please note, we are looking for someone to start as soon as possible, ideally in the next 4-6 weeks.



To Apply please fill out the form:

Work Setup



???? Fully Remote

Compensation

title: Social Media Outreach VA for Book Launch Support Network
description:
We are looking for a Social Media Outreach VA to help grow a free
 Messenger-based support network for publishers and book launch professionals.



The purpose of the messenger chat community is simple: members support each other’s launch-day campaigns by buying books on launch day in a spirit of mutual support.



(Experienced applicants are highly encouraged to apply.)



This is not a general networking role.

This is not a webinar, product launch, or internet marketing role.

This is not a role for inviting random authors who only want to promote their own book.



This role is for someone who is strong at:

-- natural outreach

-- relationship-building

-- identifying the right people

-- starting real conversations that lead to action



This is not a mass messaging job.

This is not a copy-paste spam job.

This is not a one-message close job.



This role is specifically about book launches for authors and publishers. It is not about software launches, webinar launches, product launches, or internet marketing funnels.



WHAT THE GROUP IS



This is not just a general networking group.



It is a free Messenger-based mutual-support group for publishers, launch marketers, promo admins, launch team organizers, and similar professionals involved in the book launch ecosystem.



The main purpose is simple:



Members can share launch-day book campaigns and support other members’ launches by buying books on launch day, with the expectation of mutual support in return.



So the value is not random conversation. The value is being part of a focused group of people who understand book launches and participate in reciprocal launch-day support.



This role is not about inviting random people. It is about finding people in the book launch ecosystem who understand and value that kind of support.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will:

-- find qualified people on
 and similar platforms

-- reach out to publishers, launch marketers, promo admins, launch team organizers, and similar professionals

-- start natural conversations with them

-- determine whether they are a fit

-- introduce qualified people to the group

-- log qualified invites in a shared tracker

-- communicate clearly if you have a question, issue, or blocker



WHAT MATTERS MOST



This role is results-based.



The main goal is qualified people actually joining the group.



We are not mainly measuring:

-- number of messages sent

-- number of people contacted

-- generic lead generation claims

-- activity without results



We care most about:

-- good judgment

-- strong communication

-- consistency

-- natural outreach

-- actual outcomes



IDEAL CANDIDATE



You may be a strong fit if you:

-- write English clearly and naturally

-- are confident starting conversations online

-- know how to build rapport without sounding scripted

-- can follow instructions carefully

-- understand the difference between quality and quantity

-- are coachable and dependable

-- ask good questions when needed instead of guessing

-- want a role where performance and trust matter



Experience in publishing or book launches is a plus, but not required.



WE OFFER



-- weekly pay

-- paid trial period

-- opportunity for ongoing work if the fit is strong

-- clear expectations

-- direct communication

-- honest and fair working relationship

-- room to grow if you perform well

-- a role where results matter more than empty activity

-- a chance to work with a business owner who values communication, reliability, and long-term fit



IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To show that you read this post carefully, put the phrase quiet blue rocket in the subject line of your application.



Keep your application under 150 words.



In your application, include:

-- one sentence explaining the main purpose of this group

-- one short first message you would send to a publisher, launch marketer, or promo admin

-- one sentence explaining why you believe you fit this role



Do not use AI to generate a generic application for this role. I review applications carefully for fit, specificity, and real understanding of the work. Generic, overly polished, or off-target responses will not move forward.



Shortlisted applicants may be invited to a short text-based screening step before trial.



TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions above carefully.



We are looking for someone who wants more than just a job. We want someone who wants to do good work, communicate well, and be part of something that can grow over time.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
About One Janitorial

One Janitorial is a commercial cleaning company based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. We serve 700+ commercial clients across Canada with approximately 180 cleaning Alliance partners and 36 internal staff operating fully remotely. We run a high-volume, high-output recruiting operation — we are always hiring, always building our bench, and always looking for the next top performer across our sales, service, and BCO departments.



The Role

This is a full-cycle recruiting role — from writing ads that attract the right people, to sourcing, screening, and handing off the top 5 candidates to management for final approval. You are not here to post and pray. You are here to run a recruiting machine that produces qualified candidates on demand.



You will manage the entire pipeline: ad writing, posting, sourcing, video screening, structured interviewing, candidate scoring, and handoff. You will run 5–7 structured interviews per day and keep our applicant pipeline full at all times so we are never scrambling when we need someone. Our hiring is never a one-time event — we always need a warm bench.



This role is trained and supported by AI — our SOPs, scoring rubrics, and interview frameworks are built. You follow them, improve them, and flag gaps. If you need someone to hold your hand through every decision, this is not the right fit.



What You Will Do

Write, format, and post job ads on LinkedIn, Indeed, 
, Rozee.pk, OnlineJobs.ph, and other platforms — optimized to attract the right candidates, not just any applicant



Actively source candidates through outreach, platform search tools, and talent databases — you do not wait for inbounds only

Screen applicant pools from 300+ down to the top 50 using our scoring rubrics and video screening process

Conduct 5–7 structured interviews per day using our pre-built interview scorecard frameworks



Score and rank candidates against our role-specific avatars and behavioral benchmarks — you can spot patterns and identify top-20% performers



Build and update candidate avatars for each open role — defining what the ideal hire looks like behaviorally, technically, and culturally



Maintain the HR Hiring Pipeline board in 
 — every candidate tracked, scored, and statused in real time

Conduct reference checks and coordinate pre-hire verification steps as required



Hand off top 5 shortlisted candidates to management with a written summary of each — not just a resume, but your assessment

Maintain an active warm bench — always have backup candidates ready so we are never caught empty when a hire falls through



Track ad performance and adjust copy, targeting, and platform spend based on what is producing quality applicants

Use RingCentral for all candidate calls — manage your call volume, log notes, and follow up promptly



Required Skills & Experience



Must-Have:



2–3 years of full-cycle recruiting experience — sourcing, screening, interviewing, and placing candidates

High-volume recruiting background — you have run 5+ interviews per day and managed pipelines of 100+ candidates simultaneously



Proven experience writing and optimizing job ads that produce quality applicants — not just clicks

Strong English — written and spoken. You communicate clearly with candidates and internal stakeholders

Experience building or working from candidate avatars and behavioral frameworks — you know what good looks like before you see the resume



Comfortable with structured interview scoring — you do not wing interviews, you follow a scorecard and score objectively

Self-directed and high-output — you manage your own pipeline, your own calendar, and your own performance without being chased



Experience using 
 or similar ATS/project management tools to track candidates



Strong Preference:



Experience posting and sourcing on 
, Rozee.pk, and OnlineJobs.ph — not just LinkedIn

Experience recruiting for remote overseas roles — understands the nuances of international hiring pipelines

Familiarity with VoIP calling tools (RingCentral or similar) for high-volume candidate outreach

Experience recruiting across multiple departments simultaneously (sales, operations, customer service)

Background identifying behavioral patterns in candidates — top performers vs. liabilities — based on how they communicate, not just what their resume says



Nice-to-Have:

Experience working with AI-generated SOPs, scripts, or training materials — you are not afraid of new tools

Background in a high-growth, fast-moving SMB or startup environment

Familiarity with Indeed Sponsored Ads, LinkedIn Recruiter, or similar paid sourcing tools



What Success Looks Like

System learned within 4 days. By day 30: 50 interviews completed, 5 quality hires delivered to management, pipeline active, 
 current, and 5–7 interviews running daily without follow-up.



How to Apply

NOTE: Do NOT send a generic cover letter. We will ignore it.





Step 1: Fill out the application form using the link below. Attach your resume/CV.

Form: 



Step 2: Record a 5–8 minute video answering all four questions below. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and paste the link in the form.



VIDEO QUESTIONS (all four required):

One Janitorial is a commercial cleaning company based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. We serve 700+ commercial clients across Canada with approximately 180 cleaning Alliance partners and 36 internal staff operating fully remotely. We run a high-volume, high-output recruiting operation — we are always hiring, always building our bench, and always looking for the next top performer across our sales, service, and BCO departments.

This is a full-cycle recruiting role — from writing ads that attract the right people, to sourcing, screening, and handing off the top 5 candidates to management for final approval. You are not here to post and pray. You are here to run a recruiting machine that produces qualified candidates on demand.



You will manage the entire pipeline: ad writing, posting, sourcing, video screening, structured interviewing, candidate scoring, and handoff. You will run 5–7 structured interviews per day and keep our applicant pipeline full at all times so we are never scrambling when we need someone. Our hiring is never a one-time event — we always need a warm bench.



This role is trained and supported by AI — our SOPs, scoring rubrics, and interview frameworks are built. You follow them, improve them, and flag gaps. If you need someone to hold your hand through every decision, this is not the right fit.



What You Will Do



Write, format, and post job ads on LinkedIn, Indeed, 
, Rozee.pk, OnlineJobs.ph, and other platforms — optimized to attract the right candidates, not just any applicant



Actively source candidates through outreach, platform search tools, and talent databases — you do not wait for inbounds only

Screen applicant pools from 300+ down to the top 50 using our scoring rubrics and video screening process

Conduct 5–7 structured interviews per day using our pre-built interview scorecard frameworks

Score and rank candidates against our role-specific avatars and behavioral benchmarks — you can spot patterns and identify top-20% performers



Build and update candidate avatars for each open role — defining what the ideal hire looks like behaviorally, technically, and culturally



Maintain the HR Hiring Pipeline board in 
 — every candidate tracked, scored, and statused in real time

Conduct reference checks and coordinate pre-hire verification steps as required



Hand off top 5 shortlisted candidates to management with a written summary of each — not just a resume, but your assessment



Maintain an active warm bench — always have backup candidates ready so we are never caught empty when a hire falls through



Track ad performance and adjust copy, targeting, and platform spend based on what is producing quality applicants

Use RingCentral for all candidate calls — manage your call volume, log notes, and follow up promptly



Required Skills & Experience

Must-Have:



2–3 years of full-cycle recruiting experience — sourcing, screening, interviewing, and placing candidates

High-volume recruiting background — you have run 5+ interviews per day and managed pipelines of 100+ candidates simultaneously



Proven experience writing and optimizing job ads that produce quality applicants — not just clicks

Strong English — written and spoken. You communicate clearly with candidates and internal stakeholders

Experience building or working from candidate avatars and behavioral frameworks — you know what good looks like before you see the resume



Comfortable with structured interview scoring — you do not wing interviews, you follow a scorecard and score objectively

Self-directed and high-output — you manage your own pipeline, your own calendar, and your own performance without being chased



Experience using 
 or similar ATS/project management tools to track candidates



Strong Preference:



Experience posting and sourcing on 
, Rozee.pk, and OnlineJobs.ph — not just LinkedIn

Experience recruiting for remote overseas roles — understands the nuances of international hiring pipelines

Familiarity with VoIP calling tools (RingCentral or similar) for high-volume candidate outreach

Experience recruiting across multiple departments simultaneously (sales, operations, customer service)

Background identifying behavioral patterns in candidates — top performers vs. liabilities — based on how they communicate, not just what their resume says



Nice-to-Have:



Experience working with AI-generated SOPs, scripts, or training materials — you are not afraid of new tools

Background in a high-growth, fast-moving SMB or startup environment

Familiarity with Indeed Sponsored Ads, LinkedIn Recruiter, or similar paid sourcing tools



What Success Looks Like

System learned within 4 days. By day 30: 50 interviews completed, 5 quality hires delivered to management, pipeline active, 
 current, and 5–7 interviews running daily without follow-up.



How to Apply

NOTE: Do NOT send a generic cover letter. We will ignore it.





Step 1: Fill out the application form using the link below. Attach your resume/CV.

Form: wkf.ms/3PhxiwP



Step 2: Record a 5–8 minute video answering all four questions below. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and paste the link in the form.



VIDEO QUESTIONS (all four required):



Walk us through a real role you recruited for — show your screen if you can. What was the role, what did the pipeline look like, and how did you get from 200 applicants to the final shortlist? We want to see how you actually work, not what you think we want to hear.



Our operations manager is not a recruiter. Explain to her what a candidate avatar is, why it matters, and how you would use it to screen 300 applicants down to 20. Speak as if she has never recruited before.



You have been asked to find 10 qualified candidates for an appointment setter role within 5 business days. Walk us through exactly how you would do that — which platforms, what outreach looks like, how you screen, and what you hand off to us at the end.



What recruiting tools have you used in the last 90 days? Show us your screen. We want to see active use — not a list of tools you once heard of.



Applications with completed videos are reviewed first. Include a portfolio, sample job ad, or demo of your work for bonus consideration.



Compensation & Growth

$1,200 – $1,800 CAD/month depending on experience and results

Performance reviews at 30, 60, and 90 days with potential raise based on output quality

Long-term role — we recruit continuously, this is not a project hire

Autonomy — you own the recruiting function. If something should be done differently, you tell us

Growth opportunity — as One Janitorial scales, so does the team you build

title: Operations Assistant (Purchasing Focus)[Excel master]
description:
Join a Fast?Growing Startup Built for People Who Want More



We’re not looking for “just an assistant.”

We’re looking for driven, hungry people who want to learn fast, grow fast, and earn more.



If you’re action?oriented, ambitious, and tired of slow careers with capped salaries, this role is for you.



What You Get (First Things First)

Performance?based salary increases every year

The better your results, the more you earn. No ceiling.

Extra paid day off during summer

Paid holidays

Employee discounts on our products

Long?term career opportunity for people who deliver results

A startup environment where effort is noticed and rewarded

A culture that values ambition, growth, and real income

This is not for people looking to coast.

This is for people who want to build skills, responsibility, and income.



Your Role

You will work closely with the team on core operational and commercial activities:



Manage B2B purchasing and product sourcing

Negotiate pricing and terms with suppliers

Track competitor pricing and update prices across all our stores

Analyze and track pricing variations across multiple suppliers

Maintain accurate price tracking and cost analysis

Support daily operations and business activities

Use Excel (basic to intermediate level)

Make simple Photoshop edits (titles, minor adjustments)

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, etc.) to work faster and smarter

Work efficiently with a minimum two?screen setup

Who We’re Looking For

Experience in B2B purchasing or supplier negotiation

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Organized, reliable, and a fast learner

Comfortable with Excel

Basic Photoshop skills (beginner level is fine)

Familiar with AI tools (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, etc.)

Hungry mindset with strong self?discipline

Motivated by growth, responsibility, and earning more

No lazy mindset.

Only motivated, driven people.



How to Apply (Important)

Reply only with:



“no compromise ”



AND answer the following:



B2B only:



Which brands, companies, or suppliers have you previously purchased from or worked with?

(List at least three.)

What was the purchase volume?

Did you handle logistics?

If yes, from which country ?

Nothing else needed.

description:

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Do you find joy in building meaningful client relationships, supporting their success, and being a trusted guide as they reach their goals? If you’re someone who thrives on connection and collaboration, we’d be delighted to welcome you to our team!



About Us:



Kalicube is a premium Digital Branding Consultancy for entrepreneurs in the AI era. Leveraging 25 billion data points, Kalicube gives entrepreneurs unprecedented control over how they're represented to decision-makers online through visible, influential personal brands that open doors rather than close them. Kalicube is the powerhouse of Knowledge Panel and Brand SERP services.



Job Summary:



At Kalicube, our clients’ success is at the heart of everything we do. As a Customer Success Specialist, you’ll be their trusted advocate, helping them achieve their Brand SERP and Knowledge Panel goals. This role is all about building lasting relationships, providing proactive support, and guiding clients so they gain the full value of Kalicube’s services and the Kalicube Pro SaaS platform.



Your Key Responsibilities:



Be the primary point of contact for a portfolio of Kalicube clients, fostering trust and strong relationships.

Lead onboarding for new clients, ensuring they feel confident and supported from day one.

Proactively connect with clients to understand their goals and help them get the most out of Kalicube’s services and software.

Manage essential account setup and maintenance tasks, such as accurately classifying page types in the Kalicube Pro platform.

Create and adapt client-specific playbooks (using company templates) to provide clear, tailored roadmaps.

Respond promptly and helpfully to client questions via
, chat, and video calls.

Share best practices on Brand SERPs and Knowledge Panels using Kalicube’s proven methodology.

Monitor client health and platform usage to identify and address potential issues early.

Collect and share client feedback to support continuous improvement of our products and services.

Keep accurate, detailed records of client interactions and progress in our CRM.



Skills and Traits:



Excellent written and spoken English with proactive and clear communication.

Strong interpersonal skills with a genuine passion for relationships, empathy, and helping others succeed.

Highly organized with the ability to balance client-facing and internal tasks effectively.

Careful attention to detail, especially in process-driven work like data classification and documentation.

Professional maturity and resilience — able to stay composed and positive in a fast-paced environment.

Logical, objective approach to solving problems and making decisions.

Comfortable learning and working with new software platforms quickly.

Previous experience in customer service, customer success, or account management is a plus, but not required.

Genuine interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online brand management.



What Kalicube Offers:



Work Arrangement: 100% remote, 40 hours a week

Starting Salary: 91USD/week, paid weekly

Salary Review: After 3 months subject for salary increase

Internet Subsidy: Paid monthly, after 3 months

Paid Vacation: 2 weeks of paid vacation after 12 months

SSS, Pag-ibig and PhilHealth: Contributions paid monthly, after 3 months

Bonus: 13th-month bonus, prorated

Career Growth: Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

Work Atmosphere: Courageous, smart, fun, family-friendly, and diverse.



You won’t just join a team—you’ll be part of a supportive family that truly cares about your growth and success. If you’re ready to share your Customer Success expertise with a company that values people as much as client outcomes, we’d be excited to receive your application!



Important links to visit before applying:













How to Apply: 



To maximize your chances of moving forward, please review the full job details and ensure you read and follow the application instructions provided in this document:

title: Legal Assistant
description:
Our law firm is seeking a dependable and proactive Administrative & Marketing Assistant to support both daily office operations and digital marketing efforts. This role is a mix of administrative support, client communication, and marketing tasks such as posting podcasts, managing social media content, and helping with
 campaigns. It’s a great fit for someone who is highly organized, tech-savvy, and excited about helping a growing real estate and business law practice expand its reach.



Responsibilities:



Manage calendars, appointments, and reminders



Handle client intake forms, scheduling, and follow-up
s



Organize and maintain digital files and records



Prepare and send invoices, track payments, and assist with bookkeeping tasks



Draft and format professional correspondence



Post podcast episodes and manage distribution across platforms



Create and schedule posts for social media 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)



Assist with
 marketing campaigns and newsletters



Provide general administrative and marketing support as needed



Special Instruction:

To confirm you have read this job post carefully, please include the word “Integrity” in the subject line of your application. Applications without this will not be considered.



Requirements:



Strong written and spoken English communication skills



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Prior administrative or marketing experience preferred



Experience with Canva, social media scheduling tools, and podcast posting tools (preferred but not required)

title: Creative Graphic Design Assistant
description:
Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Graphic Design Assistant to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, apply here:
